title: Superconducting States and Intertwined Orders in Metallic Altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets are a newly identified class of magnets with nodal spin-split band structures, providing a fertile platform for studying unconventional superconductivity and intertwined orders. Here we investigate multicomponent superconductivity and fluctuation-induced intertwined orders in an interacting $d$-wave metallic altermagnet that is invariant under a combination of a fourfold rotation $C_4$ and time-reversal symmetry $T$. Within mean-field theory, the superconducting ground-state manifold is described in terms of two equal-spin two-component $p$-wave gap functions $(Δ_A^x,Δ_B^y)$ and $(Δ_A^y,Δ_B^x)$, where $A$ and $B$ refer to the two spin-polarized Fermi surfaces related by $C_4T$ symmetry. Because these two sets of gap functions condense at different temperatures, a rich phase diagram with multiple superconducting phase transitions emerges. Distinct fluctuations of sub-leading normal-state instabilities that compete with altermagnetism lift the degeneracy of the multicomponent pairing state in different ways. While nematic fluctuations enhance competition between distinct superconducting components and stabilize nematic superconducting phases, spin current-loop fluctuations promote coexistence and select a pair of chiral states. Our results uncover the pairing structure and elucidate how intertwined sub-leading fluctuations shape superconducting order in altermagnetic metals, suggesting a route toward realizing nematic and topological superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 研究交变磁体中多分量超导性和涨落诱导的纠缠序，揭示了丰富的相图和实现向列及拓扑超导的途径。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体作为新发现的磁体类别，具有节点自旋分裂能带结构，为研究非常规超导性和纠缠序提供了平台。需要理解交变磁金属中的配对结构和涨落如何塑造超导序。
AI.method: 在具有C4T对称性的相互作用d波金属交变磁体中，采用平均场理论研究多分量超导性。分析两个等自旋双分量p波能隙函数，考虑与交变磁性竞争的不同亚主导正常态不稳定性涨落。
AI.result: 超导基态流形由两组能隙函数描述，它们在不同温度下凝聚，产生具有多个超导相变的丰富相图。向列涨落增强不同超导分量间的竞争并稳定向列超导相，自旋电流环涨落促进共存并选择手性态。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了交变磁金属中的配对结构，阐明了纠缠亚主导涨落如何塑造超导序，为实现向列和拓扑超导性提供了途径。

title: Spectroscopic evidence of disorder-induced quantum phase transitions in monolayer Fe(Te,Se) superconductor
summary: The superconductor-insulator transition as a paradigm of quantum phase transitions has attracted tremendous interest over the past three decades. While the magnetic field and carrier density can be tuned to drive the transition, the role of disorder in the transition is not well understood due to the complicated interplay between superconductivity and electron localization. In this work, we controllably introduce disorder in a two-dimensional high-temperature superconductor by depositing iron clusters onto the superconducting monolayer Fe(Te,Se) crystalline film. The spectral evolution from superconducting gaps to insulating gaps with increasing disorder is detected by scanning tunneling spectroscopy measurements. When the disorder is strong, large U-shaped gaps are observed and attributed to the localization-enhanced Cooper pair correlation. Our observations provide the insight into the emergent phases of low-dimensional and high-temperature superconductors with disorder.

AI.tldr: 通过可控引入铁簇无序，研究二维高温超导Fe(Te,Se)薄膜中超导-绝缘转变，发现无序增强导致能隙从超导型转变为绝缘型，强无序下出现U型能隙，源于局域化增强的库珀对关联。
AI.motivation: 超导-绝缘转变作为量子相变的重要范例已研究三十年，但无序在其中的作用尚不清楚，特别是超导性与电子局域化之间的复杂相互作用。
AI.method: 在二维高温超导Fe(Te,Se)单晶薄膜上可控沉积铁簇引入无序，通过扫描隧道谱测量能隙随无序增强的演化。
AI.result: 观察到能隙从超导型转变为绝缘型，强无序下出现大U型能隙，归因于局域化增强的库珀对关联。
AI.conclusion: 研究为理解低维高温超导体在无序条件下的涌现相提供了重要见解。

title: Spin-polarized Andreev molecules and anomalous nonlocal Josephson effects in altermagnetic junctions
summary: Altermagnetism has emerged as a promising ingredient for realizing nontrivial Josephson phases, but so far explored in single Josephson junctions. In this work, we consider the coherent coupling of two Josephson junctions with spin-singlet $s$-wave superconductivity and demonstrate that $d$-wave altermagnetism gives rise to spin-polarized Andreev molecules due to the hybridization of Andreev bound states of each junction when the coupling is weak. Interestingly, these spin-polarized Andreev molecules induce an anomalous nonlocal Josephson effect, where the current flow across one Josephson junction due to phase changes across the other junction develops $0-π$ and $φ_{0}$ transitions originating from altermagnetism. Furthermore, the nonlocal Josephson current carried by spin-polarized Andreev molecules exhibits nonreciprocal critical currents, enabling a nonlocal Josephson diode effect whose polarity is tunable by the altermagnetic strength and right phase. Our findings put forward altermagnetism as a promising arena for designing nonlocal spin Josephson phenomena.

AI.tldr: 交变磁性在约瑟夫森结中产生自旋极化的安德烈夫分子，诱导出非局域约瑟夫森效应和二极管效应。
AI.motivation: 交变磁性已被证明是实现非平凡约瑟夫森相的有前景的材料，但此前研究局限于单个约瑟夫森结。本文旨在探索两个约瑟夫森结的相干耦合，研究交变磁性如何产生新的非局域自旋约瑟夫森现象。
AI.method: 考虑两个约瑟夫森结的相干耦合，每个结包含自旋单态s波超导和d波交变磁性。在弱耦合条件下，通过安德烈夫束缚态的杂化形成自旋极化的安德烈夫分子。
AI.result: d波交变磁性产生自旋极化的安德烈夫分子，诱导出反常非局域约瑟夫森效应，其中通过一个结的电流会因另一个结的相位变化而出现0-π和φ₀转变。此外，非局域约瑟夫森电流表现出非互易临界电流，实现非局域约瑟夫森二极管效应，其极性可通过交变磁强度和相位调控。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁性为设计非局域自旋约瑟夫森现象提供了有前景的平台，展示了其在量子器件应用中的潜力。

title: First-principles calculation of coherence length and penetration depth based on density functional theory for superconductors
summary: We develop a first-principles framework for evaluating the fundamental length scales of superconductivity, namely the coherence length $ξ_0$ and the magnetic penetration depth $λ_\mathrm{L}$, within superconducting density functional theory (SCDFT). By incorporating finite-momentum Cooper pairs, we formulate a microscopic scheme that enables a consistent and parameter-free determination of $ξ_0$, $λ_\mathrm{L}$, and the superconducting transition temperature $T_\mathrm{c}$ on the same theoretical footing. Applying the method to representative elemental superconductors, the A15 compound V$_3$Si, and H$_3$S under high pressure, we obtain results in good agreement with available experimental data. Furthermore, the unified access to $ξ_0$ and $λ_\mathrm{L}$ allows us to construct the Uemura plot entirely from first principles, demonstrating that conventional elemental superconductors systematically exhibit small $T_\mathrm{c}$/$T_\mathrm{F}$, while higher-$T_\mathrm{c}$ systems are characterized by the simultaneous realization of strong pairing and large phase stiffness. Our results establish a predictive first-principles route to superconducting length scales and provide a microscopic interpretation of empirical correlations in superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于第一性原理的框架，用于在超导密度泛函理论（SCDFT）中评估超导的基本长度尺度——相干长度ξ₀和磁穿透深度λ_L，实现了对超导参数的统一无参数计算。
AI.motivation: 超导的基本长度尺度（相干长度ξ₀和磁穿透深度λ_L）对于理解超导性质至关重要，但传统上需要不同的理论方法分别计算。本文旨在建立一个统一的第一性原理框架，在SCDFT中同时计算这些参数，消除经验参数依赖。
AI.method: 通过引入有限动量的库珀对，在超导密度泛函理论中构建了一个微观方案。该方法能够一致地、无参数地确定ξ₀、λ_L和超导转变温度T_c，所有计算都在同一理论基础上完成。
AI.result: 将该方法应用于代表性元素超导体、A15化合物V₃Si和高压下的H₃S，得到的结果与现有实验数据吻合良好。此外，统一获取ξ₀和λ_L使得能够完全从第一性原理构建Uemura图，揭示了传统元素超导体具有小的T_c/T_F，而高T_c系统同时实现了强配对和大的相位刚度。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了一个预测性的第一性原理途径来计算超导长度尺度，为超导中的经验相关性提供了微观解释，为理解超导机制提供了新的理论工具。

title: Projected Hessian Learning: Fast Curvature Supervision for Accurate Machine-Learning Interatomic Potentials
summary:
The Hessian matrix (second derivatives) encodes far richer local curvature of the potential energy surface than energies and forces alone. However, training machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) with full Hessians is often impractical because explicitly forming and storing Hessian matrices scales quadratically in cost and memory.
  We introduce Projected Hessian Learning (PHL), a scalable second-order training framework that injects curvature information using only Hessian-vector products (HVPs). Rather than constructing the Hessian, PHL projects curvature along stochastic probe directions and uses an unbiased stochastic trace-based loss with favorable system-size scaling, enabling curvature-informed training without quadratic memory growth.
  We benchmark PHL on a chemically diverse dataset of reactants, products, transition states, intrinsic reaction coordinates, and normal-mode sampled geometries computed at omegaB97XD/6-31G(d). We compare energy-force training (E-F), two HVP-based schemes (E-F-HVP with one-hot or randomized probes), and full energy-force-Hessian training (E-F-H). With randomized probes per minibatch, both HVP schemes match full-Hessian training in energy, force, and Hessian accuracy while delivering >24x epoch speedups for the small molecular systems studied. In a fixed-probe regime with one HVP per molecule, randomized projections consistently outperform one-column probing, especially for far-from-equilibrium geometries.
  Overall, PHL replaces explicit Hessian supervision with force-complexity curvature training, retaining most second-order accuracy gains while scaling to larger, more complex molecular systems.

AI.tldr: PHL是一种可扩展的二阶训练框架，通过Hessian-向量积注入曲率信息，避免显式构建Hessian矩阵的二次方内存开销，在保持二阶精度增益的同时扩展到更大分子系统。
AI.motivation: Hessian矩阵比能量和力包含更丰富的局部曲率信息，但显式构建和存储Hessian矩阵的成本和内存呈二次方增长，使得训练机器学习原子间势能时使用完整Hessian不切实际。
AI.method: 提出投影Hessian学习(PHL)框架，使用Hessian-向量积(HVPs)注入曲率信息，沿随机探测方向投影曲率，采用无偏随机迹损失函数，实现有利的系统规模扩展，避免二次方内存增长。
AI.result: 在化学多样性数据集上，随机探测的HVP方案与完整Hessian训练在能量、力和Hessian精度上匹配，同时在小分子系统中实现>24倍的epoch加速。在固定探测机制下，随机投影始终优于单列探测，特别是对于远离平衡的几何结构。
AI.conclusion: PHL用力复杂度曲率训练替代显式Hessian监督，保留了大部分二阶精度增益，同时能够扩展到更大、更复杂的分子系统。

title: Necessary conditions for the Markovian Mpemba effect
summary: The Mpemba effect is a thermodynamic anomaly in which a system farther away in temperature from equilibrium thermalizes before one that is initially closer. The effect has been experimentally observed across a wide range of systems, including water, colloids, and trapped ions. It has recently been the focus of numerous studies aimed at understanding its mechanisms and developing multiple applications. Despite extensive work in the field, clearly determining which types of systems exhibit the Mpemba effect remains an open question. To address this, we derive simple necessary conditions on the transition rates for the Mpemba effect in a Markovian 3-level system and show that they can be applied to study the Mpemba effect in an N-level system. Multiple time scales govern thermalization in these systems. This allows the evolution to occur more quickly across larger temperature differences, explaining the Mpemba effect. We apply our protocol to evaluate which types of systems exhibit the Mpemba effect and, in doing so, explain why the Mpemba effect in Markovian systems remains a thermodynamic anomaly. In particular, due to the maximum entropy principle, our conditions allow us to discard the sub-Ohmic and Ohmic spectra. The latter describes a wide range of physical and chemical phenomena, which will not exhibit the Mpemba effect. Moreover, our results provide a clear path to determine the minimal physical requirements for the Mpemba effect, and we apply them to understand its underlying mechanisms better. Finally, our protocol could help identify relevant parameters for experiments, numerical simulations and diverse applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究为马尔可夫3能级系统推导了Mpemba效应的简单必要条件，并将其推广到N能级系统，解释了该热力学异常现象的产生机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管Mpemba效应已在多种系统中被实验观测到，但确定哪些类型的系统会表现出该效应仍然是一个开放性问题。研究旨在解决这一问题，为理解Mpemba效应提供理论框架。
AI.method: 为马尔可夫3能级系统推导了Mpemba效应的简单必要条件，并将这些条件推广到N能级系统。利用多时间尺度控制热化的特性来解释Mpemba效应。
AI.result: 建立了判断系统是否表现出Mpemba效应的协议，排除了亚欧姆和欧姆谱系统（后者涵盖广泛的物理和化学现象）表现出该效应的可能性。揭示了Mpemba效应在马尔可夫系统中仍然是热力学异常的原因。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为确定Mpemba效应的最小物理要求提供了清晰路径，有助于更好地理解其潜在机制，并可为实验、数值模拟和多样化应用识别相关参数。

title: Coherent Biexciton Transport in the Presence of Exciton-Exciton Annihilation in Molecular Aggregates
summary: We present a theoretical framework for biexciton dynamics in molecular aggregates that explicitly treats populations and coherences across excitation manifolds within a reduced density-matrix formalism. By extending kinetic descriptions beyond the weak-coupling limit, the approach captures the influence of exciton delocalization and exciton-exciton annihilation while remaining computationally tractable within a Markovian description of environmental relaxation. Using this framework, we investigate how the spatial profile and momentum composition of the initial biexciton state govern fluorescence decay and transport. Incoherent initial conditions lead to strongly non-exponential relaxation and time-dependent diffusion driven by nonlinear population kinetics. In contrast, coherently prepared biexciton states exhibit pronounced early-time coherent transport, whose character depends sensitively on whether the initial state is prepared as a standing-wave or traveling-wave superposition of single-exciton modes. Despite nearly identical emission dynamics for J and H aggregate, biexciton transport properties differ markedly due to band structure-dependent interference effect. Our results demonstrate that biexciton dynamics remains strongly influenced by initial-state coherence and momentum composition. Besides initial-state preparation, the coherent-to-incoherent crossover and the diffusive spreading of the exciton density are sensitive to internal conversion processes such as exciton fusion and the decay to the first excited state. The present work establishes initial-state preparation as a key control parameter for many-exciton transport in excitonic systems and provides a general framework for interpreting nonlinear optical experiments beyond population-based descriptions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个分子聚集体中双激子动力学的理论框架，通过扩展密度矩阵方法超越弱耦合极限，研究初始态相干性和动量组成如何影响荧光衰减和输运过程。
AI.motivation: 现有激子动力学理论主要局限于弱耦合极限和基于群体的描述，无法充分处理双激子态中的相干性和动量组成效应。需要发展一个能够同时处理多激发流形中的群体和相干性、并考虑激子离域和激子-激子湮灭的理论框架。
AI.method: 扩展了约化密度矩阵形式主义，明确处理激发流形间的群体和相干性。该方法超越了弱耦合极限，在马尔可夫环境弛豫描述下保持计算可行性，同时捕捉激子离域和激子-激子湮灭的影响。
AI.result: 非相干初始条件导致强烈非指数弛豫和时间依赖性扩散；相干制备的双激子态表现出显著的早期相干输运，其特性对初始态是驻波还是行波叠加敏感。J和H聚集体虽然发射动力学相似，但双激子输运性质因能带结构相关干涉效应而显著不同。
AI.conclusion: 初始态制备是激子系统多激子输运的关键控制参数，相干性对双激子动力学有强烈影响。该工作为超越基于群体描述的非线性光学实验解释提供了通用框架。

title: Giant Magnetocrystalline Anisotropy in Honeycomb Iridate NiIrO3 with Large Coercive Field Exceeding 17 T
summary: The realization of unconventional quantum phases in frustrated and spin-orbit coupled materials remains at the forefront of quantum materials research. Here we report the synthesis and discovery of NiIrO3, the first honeycomb iridate with coupled 3d-5d magnetic sublattices, through a soft topotactic reaction. Structural analysis reveals an ilmenite-type stacking of edge-sharing NiO6 and IrO6 octahedral honeycomb sublattices in a Kitaev geometry. Comprehensive magnetic and electrical transport measurements unveil its long-range ferrimagnetic order below 213 K, which is in sharp contrast to the predominantly antiferromagnetic order in the known honeycomb iridates. Notably, the titled compound displays an exceptionally large magnetocrystalline anisotropy energy of 32.2 meV/f.u. and a giant coercivity with coercive field exceeding 17.3 T below 4.2 K, both ranking among the highest observed in iridates to date. Combined experimental and theoretical investigations indicate that the exceptional anisotropy and coercivity originate from the synergistic effect between strong lattice frustration in the coupled 3d-5d honeycomb lattice network and the robust spin-orbit coupling of the Ir4+ (Jeff = 1/2) state. This work positions NiIrO3 as a promising platform to investigate low-dimensional and frustrated quantum spin systems, and highlights its potential for spintronic applications through the targeted engineering of 3d-5d interactions.

AI.tldr: 首次合成具有耦合3d-5d磁性亚晶格的蜂窝状铱酸盐NiIrO3，表现出213K以下的长程亚铁磁序、32.2 meV/f.u.的巨大磁晶各向异性能以及超过17.3 T的巨矫顽场。
AI.motivation: 研究受挫和自旋轨道耦合材料中的非常规量子相是量子材料研究的前沿。已知的蜂窝状铱酸盐主要表现出反铁磁序，需要探索具有不同磁序和强各向异性的新材料。
AI.method: 采用软拓扑化学反应合成NiIrO3，通过结构分析确认其具有Kitaev几何的钛铁矿型堆叠结构。结合磁性测量、电输运测量以及实验与理论相结合的研究方法。
AI.result: NiIrO3在213K以下表现出长程亚铁磁序（与已知蜂窝状铱酸盐的反铁磁序形成鲜明对比），具有32.2 meV/f.u.的巨大磁晶各向异性能和超过17.3 T的巨矫顽场，这两项指标在铱酸盐中均属最高水平。
AI.conclusion: NiIrO3的异常各向异性和矫顽力源于耦合3d-5d蜂窝晶格网络中的强晶格受挫与Ir4+ (Jeff = 1/2)态的强自旋轨道耦合的协同效应。该材料为研究低维受挫量子自旋系统提供了有前景的平台，并显示出通过定向调控3d-5d相互作用实现自旋电子学应用的潜力。

title: Raman scattering spectroscopic observation of a ferroelastic crossover in bond-frustrated PrCd$_3$P$_3$
summary: 2D magnetism in triangular lattices has already shown potential for hosting exotic magnetic states. Control of these magnetic states, both in terms of magnetic properties and in terms of charge doping would be the next step. This makes materials which combine triangular lattice magnetic layers with layers hosting interesting structural or electronic properties particularly useful. PrCd$_3$P$_3$, studied in this work, is one of a family of materials where triangular lattice layers of magnetic rare earth ions alternate with semiconducting hexagonal CdP layers. Using Raman scattering spectroscopy we uncover a structural instability in the CdP layers, associated with a soft mode behavior of a phonon in these layers. Raman scattering detects crystal electric field excitations, and confirms a singlet ground state for Pr$^{3+}$ and splitting of the doublet levels as a result of the structural instability in CdP layers. While Pr$^{3+}$ is non-magnetic in PrCd$_3$P$_3$ we speculate that this family of materials can realize control of the magnetic layer through the CdP layer which can become ferroelectric under strain that would relieve frustration.

AI.tldr: PrCd₃P₃材料中，磁性三角晶格层与半导体CdP层交替排列，CdP层存在结构不稳定性，导致声子软化，影响Pr³⁺的晶体场能级分裂。
AI.motivation: 研究三角晶格磁性材料中磁性层与功能层（如半导体层）的耦合机制，探索通过功能层调控磁性层性质的可能性，为设计可控磁性材料提供新思路。
AI.method: 使用拉曼散射光谱技术，分析PrCd₃P₃材料的结构和电子性质，检测CdP层的声子行为以及Pr³⁺的晶体场激发态。
AI.result: 发现CdP层存在结构不稳定性，表现为声子软化行为；确认Pr³⁺为单重态基态，且CdP层的结构不稳定性导致Pr³⁺的双重态能级分裂。
AI.conclusion: 虽然PrCd₃P₃中的Pr³⁺是非磁性的，但这类材料体系展示了通过CdP层（在应变下可能变为铁电体）调控磁性层性质的潜力，为解决磁阻挫问题提供了新途径。

title: Tree codes and sort-and-sweep algorithms for neighborhood computation: A cache-conscious comparison
summary: Neighborhood algorithms may take a considerable percentage of computer time in discrete element methods (DEM). While the sort-and-sweep algorithm is ideal in some ways, as it only deal with particles whose relative positions change in one coordinate direction, the other directions must be processed too, for all particles. In contrast, tree-codes deal only with adjacent particles. We compare sort-and-sweep and tree-code neighborhood algorithms for two-dimensional DEM simulations of polygonal particles in a rotating drum with up to 12000 particles. We discuss the effects of system size and inlining on the performance with respect to the cache memory. For the tree code, the performance is slightly better, at the cost of significantly increased cyclomatic complexity. In particular, one benefit is improved possibilities for shared memory parallelization.

AI.tldr: 比较了离散元法中两种邻域算法：排序扫描算法和树码算法，在二维多边形颗粒旋转鼓模拟中的性能表现，发现树码算法性能略优但复杂度更高。
AI.motivation: 离散元法中的邻域算法可能占用大量计算时间，需要比较不同算法的性能表现，特别是排序扫描算法和树码算法在二维多边形颗粒模拟中的效率。
AI.method: 在二维旋转鼓中模拟多边形颗粒（最多12000个），比较排序扫描算法和树码邻域算法的性能，分析系统规模和内联对缓存内存性能的影响。
AI.result: 树码算法性能略优于排序扫描算法，但代码复杂度显著增加。树码算法的主要优势在于改进了共享内存并行化的可能性。
AI.conclusion: 虽然树码算法在性能上略有优势且更适合并行化，但其增加的代码复杂度需要在算法选择时权衡考虑。

title: Thin amorphous molybdenum silicide superconducting shells around individual nanowires deposited via magnetron co-sputtering
summary: Employing amorphous superconductors, such as Type-II molybdenum silicide (MoSi), instead of crystalline materials significantly simplifies the material deposition and scalable nanoscale prototyping, beneficial for quantum electronic and photonic device fabrication. In this work, deposition of amorphous superconductive MoSi thin films on flat and nanowire (NW) substrates was demonstrated via pulsed direct-current magnetron co-sputtering from molybdenum and silicon targets in an argon atmosphere. MoSi films were deposited on oxidized silicon wafers and Ga2O3 NWs with 6 nm Al2O3 insulating shell, grown around the NWs using atomic layer deposition, and studied using scanning and transmission electron microscopy, X-ray diffraction, and X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy. Four-point Cr/Au electrical contacts were defined on the thin films and on individual Ga2O3-Al2O3-MoSi core-shell NWs using lithography for low-temperature electrical measurements. By controlling the sputtering power of the targets and thus adjusting the molybdenum-to-silicon ratio in the MoSi films, their properties were optimized to achieve critical temperature Tc of 7.25 K. Such superconducting shell NWs could provide new avenues for fundamental studies and interfacing with other materials for quantum device applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究展示了在平面和纳米线基底上沉积非晶超导MoSi薄膜，通过调控Mo/Si比例优化性能，实现了7.25K的临界温度，为量子器件应用提供了新材料平台。
AI.motivation: 使用非晶超导体（如MoSi）替代晶体材料可以简化材料沉积和纳米级原型制备过程，有利于量子电子和光子器件的制造。研究旨在开发适用于纳米线等复杂结构的超导薄膜沉积方法。
AI.method: 采用脉冲直流磁控共溅射技术，在氩气气氛中从钼和硅靶材沉积MoSi薄膜。薄膜沉积在氧化硅晶片和具有Al2O3绝缘壳的Ga2O3纳米线上。通过控制靶材溅射功率调节Mo/Si比例，使用SEM、TEM、XRD、XPS进行表征，并通过光刻定义四电极结构进行低温电学测量。
AI.result: 成功在平面和纳米线基底上沉积了非晶超导MoSi薄膜。通过优化Mo/Si比例，实现了7.25K的临界温度（Tc）。制备了Ga2O3-Al2O3-MoSi核壳结构纳米线，并进行了电学表征。
AI.conclusion: 非晶MoSi超导薄膜在复杂纳米结构上的成功沉积为量子器件应用提供了新途径。这种超导壳层纳米线可用于基础研究以及与其他材料的界面集成，推动量子器件的发展。

title: How to improve the accuracy of semiclassical and quasiclassical dynamics with and without generalized quantum master equations
summary: Semi- and quasi-classical (SC) theories can handle arbitrary interatomic interactions and are thus well-suited to predict quantum dynamics in condensed phases that encode energy and charge transport, spectroscopic responses, and chemical reactivity. However, SC theories can be computationally expensive and inaccurate. When combined with generalized quantum master equations (GQMEs), the resulting SC-GQMEs have been observed to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of SC dynamics. Yet, while the mechanism responsible for improved efficiency is clear, the underlying improved accuracy remains elusive. What is worse, SC-GQMEs can yield unphysical dynamics in challenging parameter regimes -- a shortcoming that might be avoided if the mechanism of accuracy improvement were understood. Here, we uncover this mechanism. We leverage short-time analyses to prove that exact, "left-handed" time-derivatives delay the onset of SC inaccuracy, and show that their numerical integration yields dynamics with improved accuracy, even without the GQME. We find, however, that these derivatives are a double-edged sword: while offering greater short-time accuracy, they become unphysical in challenging parameter regimes. Because short-lived memory kernels can leverage short-time accuracy while circumventing long-time instability, we develop a protocol to unambiguously determine the memory kernel cutoff, even in challenging regimes where previous treatments had failed. Our insights into accuracy improvement and kernel cutoff protocol can be expected to apply to complex systems that go beyond simple models.

AI.tldr: SC-GQME方法结合半经典理论与广义量子主方程，能提升量子动力学模拟的效率和精度，但其精度提升机制不明，且在挑战性参数下可能产生非物理结果。本文揭示了精度提升机制，并提出了确定记忆核截断的新协议。
AI.motivation: 半经典理论能处理任意原子间相互作用，适用于凝聚相中的量子动力学预测，但存在计算昂贵和精度不足的问题。SC-GQME方法虽能提升效率和精度，但其精度提升机制不明确，且在挑战性参数下会产生非物理动力学，需要理解其机制以避免这些问题。
AI.method: 通过短时分析证明精确的"左手"时间导数延迟了SC不准确性的出现；数值积分这些导数可提升精度；开发了确定记忆核截断的协议，即使在挑战性参数下也能避免先前方法的失败。
AI.result: 揭示了SC-GQME精度提升机制：精确时间导数延迟了SC不准确性的出现，但这是双刃剑——在提供更好短时精度的同时，在挑战性参数下会变得非物理。新协议能明确确定记忆核截断，避免非物理动力学。
AI.conclusion: 对精度提升机制的理解和新的记忆核截断协议可应用于超越简单模型的复杂系统，为SC-GQME方法在量子动力学模拟中的可靠应用提供了理论基础和实用工具。

title: Resolving Spurious Multifractality in Discrete Systems: A Finite-Size Scaling Protocol for MFDFA in the 2D Ising Model
summary: Multifractal Detrended Fluctuation Analysis (MFDFA) has emerged as a standard tool for characterizing scale invariance in complex systems, yet its application to discrete spin models is frequently marred by reports of ``spurious multifractality'' that contradict established theory. In this work, we resolve this controversy by establishing a rigorous protocol for the analysis of discrete lattice snapshots. Using the 2D Ising model as a benchmark, we demonstrate that the previously reported broad singularity spectra \cite{Ludescher2011} are finite-size artifacts dominated by lattice discreteness effects in the negative moment regime ($q<0$). By restricting the analysis to positive moments and performing a systematic Finite-Size Scaling (FSS) analysis, we show that the spectral width collapses to zero ($Δα\to 0$) in the thermodynamic limit. The method accurately recovers the monofractal exponent of the Ising universality class ($α\approx H \approx 0.875$), consistent with Conformal Field Theory. To validate the discriminatory power of this protocol, we contrast these findings with the Random Bond Ising Model (RBIM), showing that quenched disorder induces a genuine, broad multifractal spectrum ($Δα\approx 0.23$) that survives scaling. Furthermore, we propose a theoretical interpretation where the MFDFA polynomial detrending functions as a phenomenological Renormalization Group filter, suppressing analytic background fields (irrelevant operators) to isolate the singular critical behavior. These results define a robust methodology for distinguishing between clean and disorder-dominated criticality in finite systems.

AI.tldr: MFDFA分析离散自旋模型时存在"虚假多重分形"问题，本文通过建立严格分析协议，证明2D Ising模型在热力学极限下是单分形的，而随机键Ising模型才具有真实多重分形谱。
AI.motivation: 解决MFDFA在分析离散自旋模型时报告的"虚假多重分形"争议，该现象与已有理论相矛盾，需要建立可靠的分析方法来区分清洁系统和无序主导的临界行为。
AI.method: 建立严格的离散晶格快照分析协议：1) 限制在正矩(q>0)分析；2) 进行系统性的有限尺寸标度分析；3) 使用2D Ising模型作为基准，与随机键Ising模型对比；4) 将MFDFA多项式去趋势解释为现象学重整化群滤波器。
AI.result: 1) 2D Ising模型在热力学极限下奇异谱宽度Δα→0，恢复单分形指数α≈H≈0.875，与共形场论一致；2) 随机键Ising模型具有真实的多重分形谱(Δα≈0.23)，能通过标度检验；3) 建立了区分清洁和无序临界行为的可靠方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过限制正矩分析和系统有限尺寸标度，可以消除离散晶格效应导致的虚假多重分形信号，准确区分清洁临界行为(单分形)和无序主导临界行为(真实多重分形)，为复杂系统尺度不变性分析提供了稳健方法。

title: Ge as an orbitronic platform: giant in-plane orbital magneto-electric effect in a 2-dimensional hole gas
summary: Increasing demand for computational power has initiated the hunt for energy efficient and stable memory devices. This is the overarching motivation behind the recent rise of \textit{orbitronics}, which looks to harness the orbital angular momentum of charge carriers in computing devices. Orbitronic devices require materials with efficient generation of orbital angular momentum (OAM). In 2D materials, OAM can be electrically generated via the orbital magneto-electric effect (OME). In this paper we report the calculation of the OME in 2 dimensional hole gases (2DHGs). We show that the OME in Ge holes is very large, for an applied electric field of the order $10^4$ V$/$m the OAM density is of the order $10^{12}$ $\hbar/$cm$^{2}$. Furthermore, we find the OME to be an order of magnitude larger than the Rashba-Edelstein effect in 2DHGs. The OME we calculated in 2DHGs generates OAM aligned in the plane and arises due to transitions between heavy and light hole states, which is unique to this system. Our results put Ge, as well as other p-type semiconductors, forward as strong candidates for building future orbitronic devices.

AI.tldr: 该论文计算了二维空穴气体中的轨道磁电效应，发现Ge材料具有极大的轨道角动量产生效率，比Rashba-Edelstein效应大一个数量级，是构建轨道电子器件的理想候选材料。
AI.motivation: 随着计算需求增长，需要寻找更节能稳定的存储器件。轨道电子学通过利用载流子的轨道角动量来实现这一目标，但需要能高效产生轨道角动量的材料。二维材料中可通过轨道磁电效应电产生轨道角动量。
AI.method: 计算二维空穴气体中的轨道磁电效应，特别关注Ge材料中的空穴系统。分析重空穴和轻空穴态之间的跃迁对轨道角动量产生的影响。
AI.result: Ge空穴的轨道磁电效应非常显著：在10^4 V/m电场下，轨道角动量密度可达10^12 ħ/cm^2。该效应比二维空穴气体中的Rashba-Edelstein效应大一个数量级，且产生的轨道角动量位于平面内。
AI.conclusion: Ge和其他p型半导体是构建未来轨道电子器件的强有力候选材料，其独特的重空穴-轻空穴跃迁机制产生了高效的平面内轨道角动量。

title: Thermodynamics of the ultrafast phase transition of vanadium dioxide
summary: Ultrafast photoexcitation is an emerging route to selective control of phase transitions. However, it is difficult to determine which modes govern the transformation and how effectively they are targeted by photoexcitation. This is exemplified in vanadium dioxide, which transitions from a monoclinic insulator to a rutile metal upon heating or photoexcitation. There is a long-standing debate about whether this transition is electronically or structurally driven and whether the structural component is coherent, driven by a single structural mode or thermal in nature. In this work, we develop a simple thermodynamic framework based on temperature-dependent ultrafast pump-probe measurements and contrast it to microscopic-detail-free modelling to identify the driving mechanism of the transition, revealing that population of the full thermal phonon spectrum, especially high-frequency oxygen modes, is necessary to stabilize the metallic phase. Our approach can straightforwardly be applied to determine the nature of other photoinduced phase transitions without the need for complex multi-messenger experiments and can guide new control strategies, even for incoherent transitions.

AI.tldr: 通过温度依赖的超快泵浦探测测量，结合热力学框架分析，揭示了二氧化钒相变需要全热声子谱（尤其是高频氧模式）的激发才能稳定金属相。
AI.motivation: 解决二氧化钒相变机制的长久争议：确定相变是由电子驱动还是结构驱动，以及结构成分是相干的（单一结构模式驱动）还是热驱动的。超快光激发是控制相变的新途径，但难以确定哪些模式主导转变以及光激发如何有效靶向这些模式。
AI.method: 开发基于温度依赖超快泵浦探测测量的简单热力学框架，并与无微观细节建模对比，以识别相变的驱动机制。
AI.result: 揭示需要激发全热声子谱（特别是高频氧模式）才能稳定金属相，表明相变具有热驱动性质。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可广泛应用于确定其他光诱导相变的性质，无需复杂的多信使实验，并能指导新的控制策略，即使对于非相干相变也适用。

title: Rapid modeling of segregation-driven metal-oxide adhesion in high-entropy alloys using macroscopic atom model
summary: Accurate prediction of metal-oxide adhesion in high-entropy alloys (HEAs) is challenging because interfacial segregation, atomic environments, and macroscopic thermodynamic quantities are strongly correlated. Relying solely on first-principles approaches is too expensive for exploring composition, solute concentration, and co-segregation effects. To address this, we extend the macroscopic atom model (MAM) for multicomponent alloys using composition-consistent surface fractions and an interfacial pair-probability formalism that captures deviations from random contact statistics. Applied to CoCrFeNi (AlCoCrFeNi) HEA in contact with Cr2O3 (Al2O3), the model predicts segregation energies and work of separation as continuous functions of composition, reproducing the correct segregation hierarchy of Hf, Y, Zr, and S. The stronger segregation tendency at Al2O3 interfaces, and the non-linear dependence of surface energy and adhesion on solute content and co-segregation is also captured. The results are benchmarked with DFT calculations, which shows consistent trends, particularly the strengthening of adhesion by Hf and Zr through strong metal-oxygen bonding and the weakening effect of S. These results demonstrate that the extended MAM provides a physically interpretable, computationally efficient, and quantitatively predictive framework for screening segregation-controlled adhesion beyond the limits of DFT.

AI.tldr: 扩展宏观原子模型（MAM）用于预测高熵合金与氧化物界面的粘附性能，通过考虑界面偏析和原子环境，提供了一种比DFT更高效的计算框架。
AI.motivation: 高熵合金与氧化物的界面粘附预测具有挑战性，因为界面偏析、原子环境和宏观热力学量密切相关。仅依赖第一性原理方法在探索成分、溶质浓度和共偏析效应时计算成本过高。
AI.method: 扩展宏观原子模型（MAM），采用成分一致的表面分数和界面对概率形式，捕捉随机接触统计的偏差。应用于CoCrFeNi（AlCoCrFeNi）HEA与Cr2O3（Al2O3）的界面。
AI.result: 模型能预测偏析能和分离功作为成分的连续函数，重现Hf、Y、Zr和S的正确偏析层次。捕捉到Al2O3界面更强的偏析趋势，以及表面能和粘附对溶质含量和共偏析的非线性依赖。
AI.conclusion: 扩展的MAM提供了一个物理可解释、计算高效且定量预测的框架，用于筛选超出DFT限制的偏析控制粘附，与DFT基准计算结果趋势一致。

title: Inverse-design of two-dimensional magnonic crystals via topology optimization with frequency-domain micromagnetics
summary: Magnonic crystals (MCs) are emerging spintronic metamaterials capable of manipulating transmission properties of magnons, the quanta of spin waves. Due to the complex relationship between lattice geometry and magnonic band dispersion, it remains challenging to establish general design strategies for optimizing targeted properties in MCs. In this study, we demonstrated an inverse-design framework for two-dimensional MCs to explore unconventional lattice structures with large magnonic band gaps. We employed genetic algorithms to enable global exploration of structures with a complete band gap as the objective property, and used frequency-domain micromagnetic simulations for computationally efficient band gap evaluation. Our established inverse-design method successfully discovered several previously unreported designs of MCs, whose performance was validated using time-domain micromagnetic simulations. Furthermore, we observed that the design landscape becomes increasingly non-convex at high-order bands, suggesting the existence of multiple design solutions. The overall inverse-design framework is expected to be broadly applicable to experimentally accessible material systems and device dimensions, facilitating the formulation of design rules for MCs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于遗传算法的逆向设计框架，用于探索具有大磁子带隙的二维磁子晶体非传统晶格结构。
AI.motivation: 磁子晶体作为新兴的自旋电子学超材料，能够操纵磁子传输特性。但由于晶格几何与磁子带色散之间的复杂关系，建立优化目标特性的通用设计策略仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法进行全局结构探索，以完全带隙为目标特性，并使用频域微磁模拟进行高效带隙评估。
AI.result: 逆向设计方法成功发现了多个先前未报道的磁子晶体设计，其性能通过时域微磁模拟得到验证。观察到在高阶带处设计景观变得高度非凸，表明存在多个设计解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该逆向设计框架有望广泛应用于实验可及的材料系统和器件尺寸，促进磁子晶体设计规则的制定。

title: Temperature-Dependent Dielectric Function of Tantalum Nitride Formed by Atomic Layer Deposition for Tunnel Barriers in Josephson Junctions
summary: We report the dielectric functions of insulating tantalum nitride (TaN) films, deposited using atomic layer deposition (ALD) on 300 mm Si/SiO2 substrates, to demonstrate their suitability as tunnel barriers in tantalum-based Josephson junctions (JJ) for superconducting quantum circuits. The temperature-dependent ellipsometric angles were measured using ALD TaN films with nominal thicknesses of 13 nm and 25 nm at an incidence angle of 70 degrees, across photon energy ranges of 0.03 eV to 0.7 eV (80-300 K) and 0.5 eV to 6.5 eV (80-600 K). This data was used to develop a dispersion model for insulating ALD TaN films that incorporates a Tauc-Lorentz oscillator with a band gap of 1.5-1.8 eV to model the interband optical transitions. The extracted dielectric function of ALD TaN films shows an insulating behavior (mid-infrared transparency) at all temperatures and for both film thicknesses tested. ALD TaN does not exhibit infrared absorption due to free carriers, even at elevated temperatures, demonstrating its insulating nature, which is required for the tunnel barrier of the JJ in quantum applications. The results of transmission electron microscopy, including selected area electron diffraction, and X-ray diffraction are also discussed. Sputter depth-profile X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy (XPS) shows an N/Ta ratio of ~1.2 throughout the film. The lower band gap, low roughness, and thermal stability of ALD TaN compared to AlOx suggest the possibility of fabricating JJs with thicker barriers while achieving critical current densities required for qubits, better control of thickness and composition, reduced topography, and resistance to aging.

AI.tldr: 通过椭圆偏振光谱测量和建模，验证了ALD沉积的氮化钽薄膜具有绝缘特性，适合作为超导量子电路中约瑟夫森结的隧道势垒层。
AI.motivation: 为超导量子电路中的钽基约瑟夫森结寻找合适的隧道势垒材料，需要具有绝缘特性、热稳定性好、粗糙度低且能精确控制厚度和成分的材料。
AI.method: 使用原子层沉积在300mm Si/SiO2衬底上制备13nm和25nm厚的TaN薄膜；通过变温椭圆偏振光谱测量介电函数；建立包含带隙1.5-1.8eV的Tauc-Lorentz振子的色散模型；结合TEM、XRD和XPS进行材料表征。
AI.result: ALD TaN薄膜在所有温度下均表现出绝缘特性（中红外透明），无自由载流子红外吸收；XPS显示N/Ta比约为1.2；相比AlOx具有更低的带隙、更低的粗糙度和更好的热稳定性。
AI.conclusion: ALD TaN薄膜是超导量子电路中约瑟夫森结隧道势垒的理想候选材料，能够实现更厚的势垒层、更好的厚度和成分控制、更低的粗糙度以及抗老化性能。

title: Enhanced Third-Order Optical Nonlinearity in a Dipolar Carbene-Metal-Amide Material with Two-Photon Excited Delayed Fluorescence
summary: Advanced photonic materials showing two-photon absorption (2PA) have been widely explored to develop three-dimensional imaging, micro and nanofabrication, all-optical switching, lithography on a nanoscale and many other enabling technologies. These all require nonlinear absorption chromophores with intrinsic 2PA cross-sections and long-term photo-and thermal stability. Here, we disclose the very first example of the dipolar carbenemetal-amide (CMA) material showing a enhanced 2PA cross-section up to 105 GM. Overall molecular design considerations such as extended $π$-conjugation (to increase polarizability), minimizing the singlet-triplet energy gap ($Δ$E ST ), and using heavy metal atoms are the first design principles to obtain bright one-and two-photon excited thermally activated delayed fluorescence (TADF) material, showing one of the highest radiative rate of 2.18$\bullet$10 6 s -1 across CMA materials. Bright red CMA 2P-TADF material shows excellent photostability (LT 50 = 3 h) to 20 mW femtosecond pulsed laser excitation at 1000 nm, encouraging further CMA exploration for future applications in advanced photonic technologies requiring third-order nonlinear optical properties.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了首个具有增强双光子吸收截面的偶极碳烯金属酰胺材料，实现了高达105 GM的双光子吸收截面，并展示了明亮的一/双光子激发热激活延迟荧光特性。
AI.motivation: 开发具有高双光子吸收截面和长期光热稳定性的非线性吸收发色团材料，以满足三维成像、微纳加工、全光开关、纳米光刻等先进光子技术需求。
AI.method: 采用分子设计策略：扩展π共轭（增加极化率）、最小化单重态-三重态能隙（ΔEST）、使用重金属原子，制备偶极碳烯金属酰胺材料。
AI.result: 获得了首个具有增强双光子吸收截面的CMA材料，2PA截面达105 GM；实现了明亮的红TADF材料，辐射速率达2.18×10⁶ s⁻¹；在1000 nm飞秒脉冲激光下表现出优异的光稳定性（LT50=3小时）。
AI.conclusion: CMA材料在先进光子技术中具有应用潜力，特别是需要三阶非线性光学特性的领域，为未来光子技术发展提供了新的材料平台。

title: Dissipation-Reliability Tradeoff for Stochastic CMOS Bits in Series
summary: Physical instantiations of a bit of information are subject to thermal noise that can trigger unintended bit-flip errors. Bits implemented with CMOS technology typically operate in regimes that reliably suppress these errors with a large bias voltage, but miniaturization and circuit design for implantable biomedical devices motivate error suppression via alternative low-voltage strategies. We present and analyze an error-suppression technique that involves coupling multiple CMOS units into chains, introducing a natural error correction arising from inter-unit correlations. Using tensor networks to numerically solve a stochastic master equation for the CMOS chain, we quantify the reliability-dissipation tradeoff across system sizes that would be intractable with conventional sparse-matrix methods. The calculations show that the typical time for bit-flip errors scales exponentially with the bias voltage but subexponentially with the chain length. While a CMOS chain adds stability compared to a single CMOS unit for a fixed low bias voltage, increasing the bias voltage is a lower-dissipation route to equivalent stability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过将多个CMOS单元耦合为链状结构来抑制热噪声引起的比特翻转错误的技术，利用单元间的相关性实现自然纠错，并通过张量网络方法分析了可靠性-功耗权衡。
AI.motivation: CMOS技术中的比特实现通常通过高偏置电压可靠地抑制热噪声引起的比特翻转错误，但微型化和植入式生物医学设备的电路设计需要低电压下的替代错误抑制策略。
AI.method: 将多个CMOS单元耦合成链状结构，利用单元间的相关性实现自然纠错；使用张量网络数值求解CMOS链的随机主方程，量化系统规模下的可靠性-功耗权衡。
AI.result: 计算表明比特翻转错误的典型时间随偏置电压呈指数增长，但随链长呈亚指数增长；CMOS链在固定低偏置电压下比单个CMOS单元更稳定，但增加偏置电压是实现同等稳定性的更低功耗途径。
AI.conclusion: CMOS链结构在低电压下能有效抑制比特翻转错误，但增加偏置电压是更节能的稳定性提升方法；张量网络方法能够处理传统稀疏矩阵方法难以处理的大规模系统分析。

title: Thermodynamic Phase Transitions in Finite Su-Schrieffer-Heeger Chains: Metastability and Heat Capacity Anomalies
summary: We investigate the thermodynamic properties of finite Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) chains in thermal equilibrium at fixed temperature and chemical potential. Using the canonical and grand canonical ensembles, we calculate the energy density, particle number density, entropy, and heat capacity as functions of temperature, chemical potential, and hopping asymmetry. Our analysis reveals the emergence of a metastable thermodynamic phase characterized by a local minimum in the heat capacity for non-dimerized configurations, signaling a second-order phase transition distinct from the topological phase transition. This metastable phase becomes more pronounced as the hopping asymmetry increases and the chain length grows. We demonstrate that while the topological properties are determined by boundary states, the bulk thermodynamic behavior exhibits rich phase structure that can be tuned through the hopping parameter ratio. These findings provide insights into the interplay between topology, finite-size effects, and thermal fluctuations in one-dimensional topological systems, with potential implications for experimental realizations in cold atoms, photonic systems, and topoelectrical circuits.

AI.tldr: 研究有限SSH链在热平衡下的热力学性质，发现存在由热容局部极小值表征的亚稳态相，与拓扑相变不同，可通过跳跃参数比调控。
AI.motivation: 研究一维拓扑系统中拓扑性质、有限尺寸效应和热涨落之间的相互作用，为冷原子、光子系统和拓扑电路等实验实现提供理论基础。
AI.method: 使用正则系综和巨正则系综，计算能量密度、粒子数密度、熵和热容随温度、化学势和跳跃不对称性的函数关系。
AI.result: 发现非二聚化构型中热容存在局部极小值，表征亚稳态热力学相，这是与拓扑相变不同的二阶相变；该亚稳态相随跳跃不对称性增加和链长增长而更显著。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑性质由边界态决定，而体热力学行为展现出丰富的相结构，可通过跳跃参数比调控，为一维拓扑系统的实验实现提供重要见解。

title: Successive single-q and double-q orders in an anisotropic XY model on the diamond structure: a model for quadrupole ordering in PrIr$_2$Zn$_{20}$
summary: Quadrupole ordering with the ordering wavevector at the L points in PrIr$_2$Zn$_{20}$ under magnetic fields is analyzed using classical Monte Carlo simulations based on an effective $Γ_3$ quadrupole model on the diamond structure. We demonstrate that competition between the magnetic field and quadrupole anisotropy leads to a rich phase diagram for magnetic fields applied parallel to [001], which includes switching between a single-q state and a double-q state. We also show that a symmetry-allowed biquadratic intersite interaction, corresponding to a hexadecapole interaction, is crucial for reproducing the weak-field topology observed in experiments.

AI.tldr: 通过经典蒙特卡洛模拟分析PrIr2Zn20在磁场下的四极有序，发现磁场与四极各向异性竞争导致丰富的相图，包括单q态和双q态之间的转换，并揭示双二次相互作用对弱场拓扑的重要性。
AI.motivation: 研究PrIr2Zn20在磁场下的四极有序行为，特别是理解磁场与四极各向异性之间的竞争如何影响相图，以及解释实验中观察到的弱场拓扑特征。
AI.method: 基于金刚石结构上的有效Γ3四极模型，使用经典蒙特卡洛模拟分析磁场平行于[001]方向时的四极有序行为。
AI.result: 磁场与四极各向异性竞争导致丰富的相图，包括单q态和双q态之间的转换；对称允许的双二次相互作用（对应十六极相互作用）对于重现实验中观察到的弱场拓扑至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 四极有序系统在磁场下表现出复杂的相行为，双二次相互作用在决定弱场拓扑结构中起关键作用，这有助于理解PrIr2Zn20等材料的磁场响应特性。

title: Moire Topological Magnetism Twist-Engineered from 2D Spin Spirals
summary: Topological magnetism, characterized by topologically protected spin textures, offers rich physics and transformative prospects for spintronics. However, its stabilization typically demands external magnetic fields, preventing straightforward implementation. Here, we report a universal field-free approach for engineering 2D topologically-trivial spin spirals into topological magnetisms. This approach leverages twisted antiferromagnetic bilayers, where locked spin spirals in the two sublayers form spatially alternating ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic domains upon twisting. These domains frustrate the uniform antiferromagnetic interlayer exchange, spontaneously stabilizing moire topological magnetisms without external fields. Using first-principles and atomistic spin-model simulations, we validate this approach using bilayers NiCl2 and NiBr2, as representative examples. For twisted NiCl2, we predict topological spin states tunable by the twist angle, including isolated and high-order antiferromagnetic bimerons. For twisted NiBr2, strong frustration yields trivial triple-q spin spirals, which transform into moire topological magnetism with the application of vertical compressive strain. Our findings demonstrate that topologically non-trivial spin textures can be engineered from their trivial counterparts, thus providing a new paradigm for topological spintronics

AI.tldr: 通过扭曲反铁磁双层结构，无需外磁场即可将二维拓扑平凡自旋螺旋转化为拓扑磁性，为拓扑自旋电子学提供新范式。
AI.motivation: 拓扑磁性具有丰富的物理特性和变革性的自旋电子学应用前景，但通常需要外磁场才能稳定，这限制了实际应用。因此需要开发无需外磁场的拓扑磁性稳定方法。
AI.method: 利用扭曲反铁磁双层结构，其中两个子层的锁定自旋螺旋在扭曲后形成空间交替的铁磁和反铁磁畴。这些畴使均匀反铁磁层间交换受挫，从而自发稳定莫尔拓扑磁性。使用第一性原理和原子自旋模型模拟验证该方法，以NiCl2和NiBr2双层为例。
AI.result: 对于扭曲NiCl2，预测可通过扭转角调控拓扑自旋态，包括孤立和高阶反铁磁双半子。对于扭曲NiBr2，强受挫产生平凡三重q自旋螺旋，但在垂直压缩应变下可转化为莫尔拓扑磁性。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑非平凡自旋织构可以从其平凡对应物中设计出来，为拓扑自旋电子学提供了新范式，实现了无需外磁场的拓扑磁性稳定。

title: Escaping the Hydrolysis Trap: An Agentic Workflow for Inverse Design of Durable Photocatalytic Covalent Organic Frameworks
summary: Covalent organic frameworks (COFs) are promising photocatalysts for solar hydrogen production, yet the most electronically favorable linkages, imines, hydrolyze rapidly in water, creating a stability--activity trade-off that limits practical deployment. Navigating the combinatorial design space of nodes, linkers, linkages, and functional groups to identify candidates that are simultaneously active and durable remains a formidable challenge. Here we introduce Ara, a large-language-model (LLM) agent that leverages pretrained chemical knowledge, donor--acceptor theory, conjugation effects, and linkage stability hierarchies, to guide the search for photocatalytic COFs satisfying joint band-gap, band-edge, and hydrolytic-stability criteria. Evaluated against random search and Bayesian optimization (BO) over a space consisting of candidates with various nodes, linkers, linkages, and r-groups, screened with a GFN1-xTB fragment pipeline, Ara achieves a 52.7\% hit rate (11.5$\times$ random, p = 0.006), finds its first hit at iteration 12 versus 25 for random search, and significantly outperforms BO (p = 0.006). Inspection of the agent's reasoning traces reveals interpretable chemical logic: early convergence on vinylene and beta-ketoenamine linkages for stability, node selection informed by electron-withdrawing character, and systematic R-group optimization to center the band gap at 2.0 eV. Exhaustive evaluation of the full search space uncovers a complementary exploitation--exploration trade-off between the agent and BO, suggesting that hybrid strategies may combine the strengths of both approaches. These results demonstrate that LLM chemical priors can substantially accelerate multi-criteria materials discovery.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体Ara利用化学先验知识指导共价有机框架光催化剂的组合设计，显著加速了同时满足带隙、带边和水解稳定性多标准的材料发现
AI.motivation: 共价有机框架(COFs)作为太阳能制氢光催化剂具有潜力，但最有利的亚胺连接在水溶液中快速水解，形成了稳定性与活性之间的权衡，限制了实际应用。在节点、连接体、连接方式和官能团的组合设计空间中寻找同时具有活性和耐久性的候选材料仍然是一个巨大挑战。
AI.method: 开发了名为Ara的大型语言模型(LLM)智能体，利用预训练的化学知识、给体-受体理论、共轭效应和连接稳定性层次结构，指导搜索满足联合带隙、带边和水解稳定性标准的光催化COFs。使用GFN1-xTB片段管道筛选候选材料，并与随机搜索和贝叶斯优化进行比较。
AI.result: Ara在包含各种节点、连接体、连接方式和R基团的候选空间中实现了52.7%的命中率（是随机搜索的11.5倍，p=0.006），在第12次迭代找到第一个命中，而随机搜索需要25次迭代，显著优于贝叶斯优化（p=0.006）。智能体的推理轨迹显示出可解释的化学逻辑。
AI.conclusion: LLM化学先验知识能够显著加速多标准材料发现，Ara智能体与贝叶斯优化在利用-探索权衡上具有互补性，混合策略可能结合两者的优势。

title: Systematic study of superconductivity in few-layer $T_d$-MoTe$_2$
summary: We present a systematic investigation of superconductivity in a topological superconductor candidate $T_{\rm d}$-MoTe$_2$ in the few-layer limit. By examining multiple mechanically exfoliated samples with different thicknesses, substrates and crystal qualities, we quantitatively correlate superconducting temperature ($T_c$) with disorder, carrier density, carrier type and mobility. By integrating these experimental findings with first-principles calculations, we reveal the relationship between the band structure and superconductivity in this material. Notably, in 2 L samples we access a highly hole-doped regime that has not been systematically explored in previous experiments, providing a complementary perspective to earlier studies. In this regime, we demonstrate that superconductivity can be realized in a manner consistent with a conventional phonon-mediated $s_{(++)}$-wave pairing.

AI.tldr: 对拓扑超导体候选材料Td-MoTe2在少层极限下的超导性进行系统研究，通过实验与计算结合揭示了能带结构与超导性的关系
AI.motivation: 系统研究Td-MoTe2在少层极限下的超导性，特别是在先前实验未系统探索的高度空穴掺杂区域，为理解该材料的超导机制提供新视角
AI.method: 通过机械剥离制备不同厚度、衬底和晶体质量的样品，测量超导温度并与无序度、载流子密度、载流子类型和迁移率进行定量关联，结合第一性原理计算分析能带结构与超导性的关系
AI.result: 在2层样品中实现了高度空穴掺杂区域，发现超导性可以通过传统的声子介导s(++)波配对机制实现，为早期研究提供了补充视角
AI.conclusion: Td-MoTe2在少层极限下的超导性可以通过传统声子机制实现，特别是在高度空穴掺杂区域，这为理解该拓扑超导体候选材料的超导机制提供了重要见解

title: Viscosity as a Smoking Gun for Complex Formation in Solution: Fe$^{2+}$ and Mg$^{2+}$ Chlorides as Examples
comment: 5 figures and 7 tables in the main text
summary: Electrolyte solutions at high concentration are indispensable and yet poorly understood. In particular, the extent of speciation -- the formation of complexes composed of multiple species -- in concentrated ionic solutions is very challenging to obtain theoretically and experimentally, but can have a strong effect on solution properties. The literature is rife with contradictory estimates of speciation from experiments. We find that speciation affects transport properties, and is therefore, a prerequisite to accurately model concentrated solutions. We turn this to our advantage by showing that the viscosity can be used to determine the extent of complexation in concentrated aqueous solutions. Results of simulations as well as experimental measurements are presented. The atomistic Madrid-2019 force-field is extended to model FeCl$_2$. Solutions of FeCl$_2$ and MgCl$_2$ are compared and the observed difference in viscosity explained by more complexation in the former, a conclusion supported by recently reported X-ray absorption and neutron scattering experiments.

AI.tldr: 通过粘度测量确定高浓度电解质溶液中的络合程度，发现FeCl₂比MgCl₂有更多络合，解释了粘度差异
AI.motivation: 高浓度电解质溶液中的络合现象（多种物种形成复合物）对溶液性质有重要影响，但理论和实验上都难以准确测定。文献中关于络合程度的估计存在矛盾，而络合会影响传输性质，因此需要准确建模。
AI.method: 扩展原子级的Madrid-2019力场以模拟FeCl₂，通过模拟和实验测量粘度，利用粘度来确定高浓度水溶液中的络合程度。比较FeCl₂和MgCl₂溶液，分析络合差异。
AI.result: FeCl₂溶液比MgCl₂溶液有更多的络合现象，这解释了观察到的粘度差异。这一结论得到了最近报道的X射线吸收和中子散射实验的支持。
AI.conclusion: 粘度可以作为确定高浓度水溶液中络合程度的有效指标，络合程度对溶液传输性质有重要影响，是准确建模高浓度溶液的前提条件。

title: Disorder effects in Ising metamagnetic phase transition
comment: 8 pages Latex and 7 captioned PDF figures; IJMPC (2026) In press
summary: The thermodynamics of randomly quenched disordered Ising metamagnet has been studied by Monte Carlo simulations. The disorder has been implemented either by inserting nonmagnetic impurity or by uniformly distributed quenched random magnetic field. The staggered magnetisation ($M_s$) (calculated from the sublattice magnetisation) and the corresponding staggered susceptibility ($χ$) are studied as functions of the temperature ($T$). The antiferromagnetic phase transition has been found while cooling the system from the high temperature paramagnetic phase. The transition temperature(or pseudocritical temperature ($T_c$)) has been found to decrease as the concentration ($p$) of nonmagnetic impurity increased. The nonmagnetic impurity dependent staggered magnetisation has been found to show the scaling behaviour $M_sp^b \sim (T-T_c)p^a$ (with $a \cong -0.95$, $b \cong 0.09$ and $T_c \cong 4.45$) obtained through the data collapse. The zero temperature staggered magnetisation ($M_s(0)$) has been found to decrease linearly. The critical temperature($T_c$) is showing a linear ($T_c=mp+c$) dependence with the concentration ($p$) of nonmagnetic impurity. The antiferromagnetic phase transition has been found to take place at lower temperature for the higher value of the width ($s$) of the uniformly distributed quenched random field. The critical temperature ($T_c$) has been found to show the nonlinear dependence ($T_c=a+bs+cs^2$) on the width ($s$) of the uniformly distributed random magnetic field. The extrapolation (both for $p \to 0$ and $s \to 0$) restores the Neel temperature of three dimensional pure Ising antiferromagnet.

AI.tldr: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟研究随机淬火无序伊辛超磁体的热力学性质，分析非磁性杂质和随机磁场对反铁磁相变的影响
AI.motivation: 研究随机淬火无序（非磁性杂质和随机磁场）对伊辛超磁体反铁磁相变的影响，探索无序系统中的相变行为
AI.method: 使用蒙特卡洛模拟方法，通过插入非磁性杂质或施加均匀分布的淬火随机磁场引入无序，研究交错磁化强度和磁化率随温度的变化
AI.result: 发现相变温度随非磁性杂质浓度增加而线性降低，交错磁化强度呈现标度行为；随机磁场宽度越大，相变温度越低且呈非线性依赖；极限情况恢复纯三维伊辛反铁磁体的尼尔温度
AI.conclusion: 无序（非磁性杂质和随机磁场）显著影响伊辛超磁体的反铁磁相变，相变温度对无序参数具有特定的函数依赖关系

title: Large-Area Deterministic Stamping of 2D Materials on Arbitrarily Patterned Surfaces
summary: 2D materials and their monolayers have attracted widespread interest by virtue of their unique electronic and optical properties. In addition to their remarkable physical characteristics, their atomically thin nature enables their integration in ultra-compact photonic and electronic devices, with potential for dynamic tunability via strain, charge carrier modulation or heterostructure engineering. While early research relied on micrometer-scale mechanically exfoliated flakes, recent advances, particularly gold-assisted exfoliation of transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs), have enabled the preparation of high-quality, large-area monolayers, opening new opportunities for scalable device integration. For the field of nanophotonics in particular, the ability to transfer large-area 2D materials onto both flat and patterned substrates is essential for the development of functional devices. However, existing transfer techniques are often limited in scalability, and compatibility with structured surfaces. Here, we present a versatile and reliable transfer method of large-area monolayers and hBN/monolayer heterostructures onto both flat and nanostructured substrates. Our approach, based on the physical properties of low-density polyethylene, preserves the intrinsic optical quality of the materials and is compatible with a variety of device architectures. We demonstrate its applicability by fabricating devices that modulate the photoluminescence of TMDC monolayers through the manipulation of the photonic environment, strain or electrical gating. We further demonstrate the fabrication of van der Waals heterostructures using the same method. By enabling clean transfer of a wide range of monolayers and heterostructures, this technique offers a practical pathway for the development of next-generation optoelectronic platforms with improved functionality, scalability, and tunability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于低密度聚乙烯物理特性的通用转移方法，可将大面积单层和异质结构转移到平坦和纳米结构基底上，保持材料光学质量并兼容多种器件架构。
AI.motivation: 现有2D材料转移技术存在可扩展性和结构化表面兼容性限制，阻碍了纳米光子学领域功能器件的发展，需要一种更通用可靠的转移方法。
AI.method: 基于低密度聚乙烯物理特性的转移方法，能够将大面积单层和hBN/单层异质结构转移到平坦和纳米结构基底上，保持材料固有光学质量。
AI.result: 成功制备了通过调控光子环境、应变或电门控来调制TMDC单层光致发光的器件，并展示了使用相同方法制造范德华异质结构的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为开发具有改进功能、可扩展性和可调性的下一代光电子平台提供了实用途径，实现了多种单层和异质结构的清洁转移。

title: Orbital-Selective Spin-Orbit Mott Insulator in Fractional Valence Iridate La$_3$Ir$_3$O$_{11}$
summary: The combination of strong spin-orbit coupling and Coulomb interactions makes the $5d$ iridates a unique platform for realizing novel correlated electronic states. Here, utilizing infrared spectroscopy, we demonstrate that a robust Mott insulating state persists in the $1/3$-hole self-doped system La$_3$Ir$_3$O$_{11}$, evidenced by the collapse of the Drude response and the emergence of sharp excitations across the Mott gap. Our theoretical calculations reveal that the insulating behavior arises from the cooperative interplay of structural distortions, spin-orbit coupling, and Coulomb interactions. Specifically, octahedral distortion and Ir-Ir dimerization split the $t_{2g}$ orbitals, driving the $J_{\mathrm{eff}} = 1/2$ bands toward half-filling while keeping the $J_{\mathrm{eff}} = 3/2$ bands away from it. Consequently, electron correlations induce an orbital-selective Mott transition in the $J_{\mathrm{eff}} = 1/2$ bands, whereas a band-insulating gap develops in the $J_{\mathrm{eff}} = 3/2$ bands, thereby stabilizing the unconventional insulating state in La$_3$Ir$_3$O$_{11}$. These findings provide new insights into the design and understanding of the insulating ground state of spin-orbit-coupled iridates.

AI.tldr: La₃Ir₃O₁₁中通过红外光谱证实了稳健的Mott绝缘态，源于结构畸变、自旋轨道耦合和库仑相互作用的协同作用，导致J_eff=1/2能带发生轨道选择性Mott转变。
AI.motivation: 研究5d铱酸盐中强自旋轨道耦合与库仑相互作用结合产生的新奇关联电子态，特别是理解La₃Ir₃O₁₁这种1/3空穴自掺杂系统中的绝缘行为机制。
AI.method: 采用红外光谱技术结合理论计算，通过分析Drude响应和Mott隙激发，研究La₃Ir₃O₁₁的电子结构。理论计算分析结构畸变、自旋轨道耦合和库仑相互作用对能带的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现La₃Ir₃O₁₁中存在稳健的Mott绝缘态，Drude响应消失并出现跨越Mott隙的尖锐激发。理论表明八面体畸变和Ir-Ir二聚化分裂t₂g轨道，使J_eff=1/2能带趋向半填充，而J_eff=3/2能带远离半填充，导致轨道选择性Mott转变。
AI.conclusion: La₃Ir₃O₁₁中的非常规绝缘态源于结构畸变、自旋轨道耦合和库仑相互作用的协同作用，导致J_eff=1/2能带发生轨道选择性Mott转变，为设计理解自旋轨道耦合铱酸盐的绝缘基态提供了新见解。

title: High pressure melt dynamics in shock-compressed titanium
summary: We study the high-pressure melting behavior of titanium using laser-driven shock compression with in situ femtosecond x-ray diffraction and molecular-dynamics simulations based on a machine-learned interatomic potential. The MD simulations predict the solid-liquid coexistence on the Hugoniot in the $\sim$$111-124$ GPa range. Experimentally, we observe the first evidence of liquid at 86 GPa. We also observe pronounced microstructural changes with pressure with strong grain refinement associated with the emergence of liquid, within the solid-liquid coexistence ($\sim$$110-126$ GPa). Above 126 GPa, we observe the persistence of residual levels of highly textured crystalline Ti to $\sim$$180$ GPa, well above the expected melt completion pressure. We discuss the accuracy that current laser-shock experimental platforms have at determining the melt onset and completion pressures.

AI.tldr: 利用激光冲击压缩结合飞秒X射线衍射和机器学习势函数的分子动力学模拟研究钛的高压熔化行为，发现固液共存区间为111-124 GPa，实验在86 GPa首次观测到液体存在，并观察到显著的微观结构变化。
AI.motivation: 研究钛在高压下的熔化行为，这对于理解极端条件下材料相变和材料科学基础理论具有重要意义，同时评估当前激光冲击实验平台在确定熔化起始和完成压力方面的准确性。
AI.method: 采用激光驱动冲击压缩技术结合原位飞秒X射线衍射，以及基于机器学习原子间势函数的分子动力学模拟，通过实验和模拟相结合的方法研究钛的高压熔化行为。
AI.result: MD模拟预测固液共存区间为111-124 GPa；实验在86 GPa首次观测到液体存在；在110-126 GPa范围内观察到显著的晶粒细化等微观结构变化；在126 GPa以上，观察到高度织构的晶体钛持续存在至约180 GPa，远高于预期的熔化完成压力。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了钛在高压下的复杂熔化行为，包括固液共存区间和熔化完成压力高于预期的现象，同时讨论了当前激光冲击实验平台在确定熔化起始和完成压力方面的准确性限制。

title: Particle-Guided Diffusion for Gas-Phase Reaction Kinetics
summary: Physics-guided sampling with diffusion model priors has shown promise for solving partial differential equation (PDE) governed problems, but applications to chemically meaningful reaction-transport systems remain limited. We apply diffusion-based guided sampling to gas-phase chemical reactions by training on solutions of the advection-reaction-diffusion (ARD) equation across varying parameters. The method generates physically consistent concentration fields and accurately predicts outlet concentrations, including at unseen parameter values, demonstrating the potential of diffusion models for inference in reactive transport.

AI.tldr: 将扩散模型先验与物理引导采样结合，应用于气相化学反应系统，准确预测浓度场和出口浓度
AI.motivation: 物理引导的扩散模型采样在PDE问题中显示出潜力，但在化学有意义的反应输运系统中的应用仍然有限，需要探索扩散模型在反应输运推断中的潜力
AI.method: 训练扩散模型学习不同参数下平流-反应-扩散方程的解，使用物理引导采样生成物理一致的浓度场
AI.result: 方法能生成物理一致的浓度场，准确预测出口浓度，包括在未见过的参数值下也能有效工作
AI.conclusion: 证明了扩散模型在反应输运推断中的潜力，为化学有意义的反应系统提供了有效的解决方案

title: The Statistical Mechanics of Indistinguishable Energy States and the Glass Transition
summary: The statistical mechanics of particles that populate indistinguishable energy states is explored. In particular, the mathematical treatment of the microstates differs from conventional statistical mechanics where the energy levels or states are universally treated as distinguishable, and differentiated by unique quantum numbers, or addressed by distinct spatial locations. Results from combinatorial counting problems are adapted to derive exact distribution functions for both classical and quantum particles at high degeneracy levels. Classical particles exhibit a definitive glass transition, similar to supercooled liquids where where the configurational entropy vanishes below a finite temperature $T_K$.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了占据不可区分能态的粒子的统计力学，与传统统计力学中能态可区分的情况不同，推导了高简并度下经典和量子粒子的精确分布函数，发现经典粒子存在类似过冷液体的玻璃转变。
AI.motivation: 传统统计力学通常将能级或状态视为可区分的（通过独特的量子数或空间位置区分），但本文探索当粒子占据不可区分能态时的统计力学行为，这在某些物理系统中可能更符合实际情况。
AI.method: 采用组合计数方法，将组合计数问题的结果应用于推导高简并度下经典和量子粒子的精确分布函数，数学处理上与传统统计力学有所不同。
AI.result: 经典粒子表现出确定的玻璃转变，类似于过冷液体，在有限温度T_K以下构型熵消失，这表明在不可区分能态条件下经典系统会出现类似玻璃的相变行为。
AI.conclusion: 当粒子占据不可区分能态时，统计力学行为与传统可区分情况有本质不同，经典粒子在高简并度下会经历玻璃转变，这为理解某些复杂系统的相变行为提供了新视角。

title: Unified Integer and Fractional Quantum Hall Effects from Boundary-Induced Edge-State Quantization
summary:
Despite the success of Landau-level theory and edge-state transport formalisms, a direct microscopic link between bulk quantization and the observed hierarchy of quantum Hall plateaus has not been established. In particular, no unified microscopic mechanism accounting simultaneously for integer and fractional sequences has been derived within standard quantum mechanics.
  Here we show that boundary-induced quantization of edge states provides this missing bridge. Starting from the Landau problem in laterally confined two-dimensional electron systems, we demonstrate that the imposition of Dirichlet, Neumann, and mixed (Robin) boundary conditions discretizes both the guiding-center coordinate and the longitudinal momentum of chiral edge states. The resulting boundary-dependent spectra generate families of edge channels with well-defined multiplicities that couple to electronic transport.
  When incorporated into an edge-state transport description, this boundary quantization reproduces the integer Hall sequence and simultaneously yields a structured hierarchy of fractional filling factors without invoking separate microscopic mechanisms. We further show that a weak Hall-induced parity-breaking contribution reorganizes the low-energy edge spectrum while leaving the bulk Landau levels intact. This controlled symmetry breaking enhances edge-state multiplicities at small Landau indices and stabilizes the fractional plateaus observed at strong magnetic fields.
  The quantized Hall response thus emerges from the interplay between Landau quantization and boundary-induced guiding-center discretization, which together determine the spectrum and occupation of chiral edge channels. These results establish boundary-induced quantization as the microscopic origin of quantum Hall transport and provide a unified description of both integer and fractional regimes within conventional quantum mechanics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出边界诱导量子化作为量子霍尔效应的微观起源，为整数和分数量子霍尔序列提供了统一解释，无需分别调用不同的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管朗道能级理论和边缘态输运形式取得了成功，但尚未建立体量子化与观测到的量子霍尔平台层次之间的直接微观联系。特别是，在标准量子力学框架内，没有统一的微观机制能同时解释整数和分数序列。
AI.method: 从横向受限二维电子系统中的朗道问题出发，施加狄利克雷、诺伊曼和混合边界条件，使手性边缘态的导向中心坐标和纵向动量离散化。将边界依赖的谱纳入边缘态输运描述中。
AI.result: 边界量子化重现了整数霍尔序列，并同时产生结构化的分数填充因子层次，无需调用单独的微观机制。弱霍尔诱导的宇称破缺贡献重组了低能边缘谱，增强了小朗道指数下的边缘态多重性，稳定了强磁场下观测到的分数平台。
AI.conclusion: 量子霍尔响应源于朗道量子化和边界诱导的导向中心离散化之间的相互作用，共同决定了手性边缘通道的谱和占据。边界诱导量子化是量子霍尔输运的微观起源，在传统量子力学框架内为整数和分数区域提供了统一描述。

title: Crystal growth and magnetic properties of spin-$1/2$ distorted triangular lattice antiferromagnet CuLa$_2$Ge$_2$O$_8$
summary: CuLa$_2$Ge$_2$O$_8$ forms a distorted triangular lattice of quantum spin-1/2 Cu$^{2+}$ ions. A crystal growth method was developed using the traveling-solvent floating zone technique resulting in the synthesis of a large single crystal (4 mm$\times$4 mm$\times$10 mm). The crystal was characterized with regard to phase purity and crystallinity using powder X-ray diffraction, energy dispersive X-ray analysis and Laue diffraction, and found to be of excellent quality. The magnetic properties were characterized using dc-susceptibility, magnetization, and heat capacity measurements which revealed weak magnetic frustration with long-range magnetic order occurring below $T_N=1.14(1)$~K. The magnetic structure determined using neutron powder diffraction is a commensurate, noncollinear antiferromagnetic, different from the 120$^{\circ}$ order of an equilateral triangular antiferromagnet. The ordered moments lie in the {\bf bc}-plane, with components $m_b=0.50(3)$~$μ_{B}$ and $m_c= 0.73(5)$~$μ_{B}$ along the {\bf b}- and {\bf c}-axes respectively, giving a total ordered moment of $M_{total}$= 0.89(6)$μ_{B}/$Cu$^{2+}$ at 20~mK.

AI.tldr: 成功合成高质量CuLa₂Ge₂O₈单晶，发现其具有弱磁阻挫特性，在1.14K以下形成非共线反铁磁长程有序，不同于等边三角晶格120°有序
AI.motivation: 研究CuLa₂Ge₂O₈中量子自旋1/2 Cu²⁺离子形成的畸变三角晶格的磁性质，探索其磁有序行为和磁结构特征
AI.method: 采用移动溶剂浮区法生长大尺寸单晶，通过粉末X射线衍射、能量色散X射线分析和劳厄衍射表征晶体质量，利用直流磁化率、磁化强度和热容测量研究磁性质，通过中子粉末衍射确定磁结构
AI.result: 成功合成高质量单晶(4×4×10 mm)，发现弱磁阻挫和长程磁有序转变温度TN=1.14K，磁结构为共线非共线反铁磁有序，有序磁矩位于bc平面，总有序磁矩为0.89μB/Cu²⁺
AI.conclusion: CuLa₂Ge₂O₈形成畸变三角晶格量子自旋系统，表现出弱磁阻挫和独特的非共线反铁磁有序，不同于等边三角晶格的120°有序结构

title: Damage Prediction of Sintered α-SiC Using Thermo-mechanical Coupled Fracture Model
summary: A three-way coupled thermo-mechanical fracture model is presented to predict the damage of brittle ceramics, in particular α-SiC, over a wide range of temperatures (20-1400 C). Predicting damage over such a range of temperatures is crucial for thermal protection systems for many systems such as spacecraft. The model, which has been implemented in MOOSE, is divided into three modules: elasticity, damage phase field, and heat conduction. Analytical approaches for determining crack length scales are presented for both simple tension and simple shear. Validation tests are conducted for both flexural strength and fracture toughness over the specified range of temperatures. Flexural strength simulation results fall within the uncertainty region of the experimental data, and mode I fracture toughness simulation results are also in agreement with the experimental data. Mode II and mixed mode fracture toughness simulations results are presented with the modified G-criterion. Finally, the parallel computing capabilities of the model is considered in various scalability tests.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个三向耦合热-力学断裂模型，用于预测脆性陶瓷（特别是α-SiC）在宽温度范围（20-1400°C）内的损伤，该模型在MOOSE中实现，包含弹性、损伤相场和热传导三个模块。
AI.motivation: 预测脆性陶瓷在宽温度范围内的损伤对于航天器等系统的热防护系统至关重要，需要开发能够准确模拟材料在极端温度条件下断裂行为的模型。
AI.method: 开发了一个三向耦合热-力学断裂模型，在MOOSE框架中实现，包含三个模块：弹性模块、损伤相场模块和热传导模块。提出了确定裂纹长度尺度的分析方法，并进行了弯曲强度和断裂韧性的验证测试。
AI.result: 弯曲强度模拟结果落在实验数据的不确定区域内，I型断裂韧性模拟结果与实验数据一致。使用修正的G准则展示了II型和混合型断裂韧性模拟结果，并考虑了模型的并行计算能力。
AI.conclusion: 该三向耦合热-力学断裂模型能够有效预测α-SiC等脆性陶瓷在宽温度范围内的损伤行为，为热防护系统的设计和分析提供了可靠的计算工具。

title: A minimal electrostatic theory for the Seebeck coefficient in liquids
summary: The Seebeck coefficient in liquids often reaches the mV/K range, yet its microscopic origin remains unclear due to the complexity of electrolyte systems. Here we propose a minimal electrostatic theory focusing on solvation entropy. Using the extended Born equation with temperature ($T$)-dependent dielectric constant ($\varepsilon$), we quantitatively reproduce the experimentally observed magnitude. The theory clarifies that large valence, small cationic radius, small dielectric constant, and large $\frac{d\varepsilon}{dT}$ are key factors for enhanced liquid Seebeck response.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于溶剂化熵的最小静电理论，解释了液体中塞贝克系数达到mV/K量级的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 液体中的塞贝克系数经常达到mV/K范围，但由于电解质系统的复杂性，其微观起源仍不清楚。
AI.method: 使用具有温度依赖性介电常数的扩展玻恩方程，提出一个聚焦于溶剂化熵的最小静电理论。
AI.result: 该理论定量地再现了实验观测到的塞贝克系数大小，并阐明了高化合价、小阳离子半径、小介电常数和大的dε/dT是增强液体塞贝克响应的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 通过基于溶剂化熵的静电理论，成功解释了液体中塞贝克效应的微观机制，为理解和设计高性能热电液体材料提供了理论基础。

title: Absence of Orbital Hall Magnetoresistance in Nonmagnet/Ferromagnet Bilayers with Large Orbital Torque
summary: We report the absence of orbital Hall magnetoresistance (OMR) in nonmagnet/ferromagnet bilayers, challenging the general assumption that orbital transport mimics spin transport. Despite the observation of giant orbital torques, confirming the generation of orbital currents, thickness-dependent magnetoresistance measurements reveal that the signal is dominated by the intrinsic magnetoresistance of the ferromagnet and current shunting, with no discernible OMR contribution. We attribute this contradiction to the distinct transport properties of orbital compared with spin. Orbital currents undergo isotropic bulk absorption in the ferromagnet rather than anisotropic interfacial reflection required for OMR. Furthermore, we find that texture-induced magnetoresistance and self-torques in Ni-based bilayers can generate misleading signals, suggesting that caution is required when employing Ni in orbitronic studies. These findings clarify the distinct physical rules governing orbital transport and provide a simple method to distinguish spin and orbital currents.

AI.tldr: 该论文报告在非磁体/铁磁体双层结构中未观测到轨道霍尔磁阻效应，挑战了轨道输运模拟自旋输运的普遍假设，揭示了轨道与自旋输运的物理机制差异。
AI.motivation: 当前研究普遍假设轨道输运与自旋输运具有相似特性，但该研究旨在验证这一假设是否正确，并探索轨道电流在铁磁体中的实际输运行为。
AI.method: 通过厚度依赖的磁阻测量分析非磁体/铁磁体双层结构，排除铁磁体本征磁阻和电流分流的影响，同时研究Ni基双层结构中纹理诱导磁阻和自转矩的干扰效应。
AI.result: 实验未检测到轨道霍尔磁阻信号，观测到的信号主要由铁磁体本征磁阻和电流分流主导；轨道电流在铁磁体中经历各向同性体吸收而非各向异性界面反射；Ni基结构会产生误导性信号。
AI.conclusion: 轨道输运遵循与自旋输运不同的物理规则，轨道电流在铁磁体中主要通过体吸收而非界面反射，这为区分自旋和轨道电流提供了简单方法，并警示在轨道电子学研究中需谨慎使用Ni材料。

title: Higher harmonics in Mott-Hubbard insulators as sensors
summary: Using strong-coupling time-dependent perturbation theory, we study the response of Mott and charge-transfer insulators to an oscillating electric field. We derive analytical expressions for the resulting higher-harmonic currents and show that they encode information about spin order and microscopic hopping pathways. The results demonstrate that higher harmonics can serve as probes of correlated materials and as sensors of the applied driving field.

AI.tldr: 利用强耦合含时微扰理论研究Mott绝缘体和电荷转移绝缘体对振荡电场的响应，推导高阶谐波电流的解析表达式，证明其可探测自旋序和微观跃迁路径。
AI.motivation: 研究强关联材料在强电场驱动下的非线性响应，探索利用高阶谐波作为探测材料微观结构和自旋序的新方法。
AI.method: 采用强耦合含时微扰理论，分析Mott绝缘体和电荷转移绝缘体在振荡电场中的响应，推导高阶谐波电流的解析表达式。
AI.result: 高阶谐波电流包含自旋序和微观跃迁路径的信息，可作为强关联材料的探测工具和驱动场的传感器。
AI.conclusion: 高阶谐波分析为研究强关联材料提供了新途径，既能探测材料内部的自旋序和微观结构，又能作为驱动场的敏感探测器。

title: Design rules for industrial-scale sintering of UB4-UBC composites with high uranium density
summary: Uranium borides are promising candidate fuel forms for use in advanced nuclear reactors due to their high thermal conductivity and potential for dual use as both fuel and burnable absorber materials. In this work, uranium tetraboride (UB$_4$) and uranium monoboroncarbide (UBC) composites were synthesized using an industrially scalable borocarbothermic reduction method. The high-temperature structural evolution of the as-synthesized borides was investigated using in situ synchrotron X-ray diffraction (SXRD). The oxidation behavior was further characterized using a combination of SXRD and thermogravimetric analysis (TGA), allowing direct comparison with other potential accident-tolerant fuels such as UB$_2$, U$_3$Si$_2$, UC, and UN. The UB$_4$-UBC composite shows higher uranium loading than monolithic UB$_4$ and demonstrates promising oxidation behavior at elevated temperature, pointing to its potential as an improved uranium boride-based fuel form.

AI.tldr: 铀硼化物（UB₄和UBC复合材料）通过硼碳热还原法合成，具有高铀负载量和良好高温氧化性能，适合作为先进核反应堆燃料。
AI.motivation: 铀硼化物因其高热导率和可作为燃料/可燃吸收剂的双重用途，是先进核反应堆的潜在燃料形式。需要研究其高温结构演变和氧化行为，以评估其作为事故容错燃料的潜力。
AI.method: 采用工业可扩展的硼碳热还原法合成UB₄和UBC复合材料；利用原位同步辐射X射线衍射研究高温结构演变；结合同步辐射XRD和热重分析表征氧化行为，并与UB₂、U₃Si₂、UC、UN等其他潜在事故容错燃料进行对比。
AI.result: UB₄-UBC复合材料比单一UB₄具有更高的铀负载量；在高温下表现出良好的氧化行为；显示出作为改进型铀硼化物燃料的潜力。
AI.conclusion: UB₄-UBC复合材料是一种有前景的铀硼化物基燃料形式，具有高铀负载量和良好的高温稳定性，适合作为先进核反应堆的事故容错燃料。

title: Why Projection-Based DMRG-in-DFT Cannot Be Exact, Even with the Exact Exchange-Correlation Functional
summary: We establish the theoretical foundations for embedding a correlated wave function in an environment formed by Kohn-Sham orbitals. We show that introducing an approximation which equates two, in principle distinct, kinetic-energy functionals yields an embedding functional identical to the projection-based wavefunction-in-DFT formulation of Miller and co-workers. We demonstrate that this functional is inherently nonvariational: its minimum is not guaranteed to coincide with the exact ground-state energy and remains bounded from above by it. Building on this formal framework, we analyze the dominant sources of error in projection-based DMRG-in-DFT embedding with approximate exchange-correlation (xc) functionals. Using molecules with dissociating covalent bonds as a diagnostic example, we demonstrate that the primary source of error is the nonadditive exchange-correlation energy describing the nonclassical coupling between the active subsystem and its environment. Eliminating the fractional-spin error by employing a pair-density xc functional (PDFT) instead of a semilocal GGA does not remedy this deficiency, because the inaccuracy stems from self-interaction effects at the subsystem-environment interface.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了相关波函数嵌入Kohn-Sham轨道环境的理论基础，揭示了投影基波函数-DFT嵌入泛函的非变分性质，并分析了DMRG-in-DFT嵌入中误差的主要来源。
AI.motivation: 研究波函数嵌入DFT方法的理论基础，特别是投影基波函数-DFT嵌入泛函的性质，并分析实际应用中误差的主要来源，以改进混合量子化学计算方法。
AI.method: 通过理论推导建立相关波函数嵌入Kohn-Sham轨道环境的数学框架，引入近似使两个动能泛函相等，得到与投影基波函数-DFT相同的嵌入泛函。使用解离共价键分子作为诊断示例，分析DMRG-in-DFT嵌入中交换相关泛函的误差来源。
AI.result: 证明了投影基波函数-DFT嵌入泛函具有固有的非变分性质：其最小值不一定与精确基态能量一致，且始终被精确能量从上方界定。误差主要源于描述活性子系统与环境之间非经典耦合的非加性交换相关能量，即使使用消除分数自旋误差的PDFT泛函也无法解决，因为误差源于子系统-环境界面的自相互作用效应。
AI.conclusion: 投影基波函数-DFT嵌入方法存在固有的非变分性质，其误差主要来自子系统-环境界面的非加性交换相关能量描述不准确，这源于自相互作用效应，而非分数自旋误差。这为改进混合量子化学计算方法提供了重要的理论指导。

title: Diffusion disorder in the contact process
summary: We study the effects of spatially inhomogeneous diffusion on the non-equilibrium phase transition in the contact process. The directed-percolation critical point in the contact process is known to be stable against the addition of a spatially uniform diffusion term. Correspondingly, we find quenched randomness in the diffusion rates to be irrelevant by power counting in the field-theory of the contact process. However, large-scale Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that such diffusion disorder destabilizes the clean directed percolation critical point. Instead, the transition belongs to the same infinite-randomness universality class as the contact process with disorder in the infection or healing rates. To explain these results, we develop an effective model with an infinite diffusion rate; it shows that diffusion disorder generates an effective disorder in the healing rates. The same mechanism also appears in the field-theoretic description: Whereas diffusion disorder is irrelevant by power-counting, it generates standard random-mass disorder under renormalization. We discuss the validity of this mechanism for other absorbing state transitions and non-equilibrium phase transitions in general.

AI.tldr: 扩散率空间不均匀性会破坏接触过程的定向渗透临界点，使其转变为无限随机性普适类
AI.motivation: 研究空间不均匀扩散对接触过程非平衡相变的影响，探索扩散无序性对定向渗透临界点的稳定性
AI.method: 结合场论功率计数分析和大规模蒙特卡洛模拟，并开发无限扩散率的有效模型
AI.result: 扩散无序性虽然在场论功率计数中无关紧要，但在模拟中会破坏清洁定向渗透临界点，使相变属于与感染/治愈率无序相同的无限随机性普适类
AI.conclusion: 扩散无序性通过重整化产生有效的治愈率无序，这种机制可能适用于其他吸收态相变和非平衡相变

title: Energy conservation and pressure relaxation in an extended two-temperature model for copper with an electron temperature-dependent interaction potential
summary: An implementation of an electron temperature-dependent interaction potential for copper in a two-temperature model-molecular dynamics framework is presented. An algorithm for enforcing energy conservation when using such an interaction is provided that is needed due to the changing interaction strength with the degree of excitation. Furthermore, focus is put on how to treat the pressure differences due to an electron temperature gradient following laser irradiation. The influence of various extensions is investigated in large-scale two-temperature model molecular dynamics simulations and compared to existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 实现铜的电子温度依赖相互作用势能，提出能量守恒算法，研究电子温度梯度下的压力处理，通过大规模模拟比较不同方法
AI.motivation: 在双温度模型分子动力学框架中，电子温度变化会影响原子间相互作用势能，需要开发相应的能量守恒算法来处理这种依赖关系，并解决激光辐照后电子温度梯度引起的压力差异问题
AI.method: 实现电子温度依赖的铜相互作用势能，提出能量守恒算法以应对相互作用强度随激发程度的变化，研究处理电子温度梯度引起的压力差异的方法，通过大规模双温度模型分子动力学模拟比较不同扩展方法
AI.result: 开发了完整的电子温度依赖相互作用势能实现方案，包括能量守恒算法和压力梯度处理方法，通过大规模模拟验证了各种扩展方法的效果，并与现有方法进行了比较
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了电子温度依赖的铜相互作用势能框架，解决了能量守恒和压力梯度处理等关键问题，为双温度模型分子动力学模拟提供了更准确的工具

title: The Angular Localization Function (ALF): a practical tool to measure solvent angular order with Molecular Density Functional Theory
summary: Molecular density functional theory is a powerful technique for efficiently computing the spatially and orientationally dependent equilibrium density of a molecular solvent around an arbitrary solute. This density encodes the detailed solvent structure, but contains so much information that it is difficult to interpret comprehensively. Although spatial dependence is frequently analyzed through orientationally integrated number density, angular information remains poorly exploited. The present work addresses this gap by introducing a function that provides a local measure of the angular order: the Angular Localization Function (ALF), derived from the ideal free energy functional, which quantifies the entropy. We discuss the connections between ALF and well known statistical functions. We illustrate the utility of ALF by discussing the solvent structure for three systems immersed in water: water as a solute, an octanol molecule, and three clay minerals (talc, fluorotalc and pyrophyllite) with small differences in their structure leading to subtle effects on their interactions with water. ALF provides information complementary to quantities such as the average polarization or charge density to characterize the local orientational distribution of solvent molecules around solutes and next to surfaces. It also offers a convenient visualization tool akin to the Electronic Localization Function (ELF) used to analyze bonding in quantum chemistry.

AI.tldr: 提出Angular Localization Function (ALF)作为分子密度泛函理论中分析溶剂分子局部角度有序性的新工具
AI.motivation: 分子密度泛函理论能计算溶剂分子的空间和取向依赖密度，但传统取向积分数密度方法丢失了角度信息，需要新的工具来全面分析溶剂结构
AI.method: 从理想自由能泛函推导出Angular Localization Function (ALF)，作为局部角度有序性的度量，量化熵信息
AI.result: ALF能提供与平均极化或电荷密度互补的信息，有效表征溶剂分子在溶质周围和界面附近的局部取向分布，类似于量子化学中的ELF可视化工具
AI.conclusion: ALF填补了分子密度泛函理论中角度信息分析的空白，为理解溶剂结构提供了新的视角和可视化工具，在水、辛醇和粘土矿物等系统中展示了其应用价值

title: Fluctuation-induced quadrupole order in magneto-electric materials
summary: Phases that go beyond dipolar ordering and into multipolar ordering have recently been observed in magneto-electric materials. The resulting phase diagram is commonly explained using the concept of competing orders and exact microscopic interactions. In contrast, we propose an approach based on composite order emerging from a parent phase to explain quadrupoling above magnetic or electric dipolar orders. We include thermal fluctuations and symmetry and show their influence on the emergence of quadrupolar order. We find an analytical expression for the quadrupolar transition temperature, the critical anisotropy and explain the coupling of the quadrupolar order to mechanical strain, in agreement with experiments. The shift in perspective on quadrupolar ordering from competing to composite order is universal and can be extended to other types of multipolar ordering. This offers the possibility of understanding tunability and material-specific predictions of the related phase transitions without explicit knowledge of the microscopic mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 论文提出从复合序而非竞争序的角度理解四极有序，建立了包含热涨落和对称性的理论框架，解释了四极有序在磁/电偶极序之上的出现机制。
AI.motivation: 传统上多极有序相图用竞争序和微观相互作用解释，但本文提出需要新的视角来理解四极有序在磁电材料中的出现，特别是如何从母相中作为复合序产生。
AI.method: 采用基于复合序的理论方法，包含热涨落和对称性分析，推导四极有序的解析表达式，研究其与机械应变的耦合关系。
AI.result: 获得了四极有序转变温度的解析表达式和临界各向异性参数，解释了四极有序与机械应变的耦合机制，与实验结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 从竞争序到复合序的视角转变具有普适性，可扩展到其他多极有序类型，为理解相关相变的可调谐性和材料特异性预测提供了新途径，无需依赖微观机制的详细知识。

title: Topological Surface Charge Detection via Active Capacitive Compensation: A Pathway to the 4D Quantum Hall Effect
summary: The topological magnetoelectric effect (TME) in three-dimensional topological insulators (TIs), described by $ΔP = \frac{e^2}{2h} N_{\rm Ch}^{(2)} ΔB$, serves as a condensed-matter realization of the four-dimensional quantum Hall effect (4D QHE). In dual-gate axion-insulator devices, the TME-induced polarization yields a current $I_{\rm TME} \propto (C_{\rm total}/C_{\rm S})\,Q_{\rm 4D\text{-}QHE}$, where the signal is suppressed by the capacitance ratio $C_{\rm total}/C_{\rm S}$. Here we propose an active compensation scheme that introduces a tunable negative capacitance $C_{\rm comp} \approx -C_{\rm gate}$ into the gate line, effectively canceling the gate dielectric capacitance and driving $C_{\rm total}/C_{\rm S} \to 1$. We validate the method using a quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) device, which shares the same surface-state physics with the axion insulator but permits direct charge measurement via a single gate, recovering over $95\%$ of the quantized charge signal from an initially half-attenuated state. This compensation method provides a robust means of resolving minute TME signals, offering a promising pathway toward direct measurements of the 4D QHE.

AI.tldr: 提出一种主动补偿方案，通过引入可调负电容来抵消栅极介电电容，使拓扑磁电效应信号增强，实现四维量子霍尔效应的直接测量。
AI.motivation: 在双栅轴子绝缘体器件中，拓扑磁电效应产生的电流信号受到电容比C_total/C_S的抑制，导致信号衰减，难以直接测量四维量子霍尔效应。
AI.method: 提出主动补偿方案，在栅极线路中引入可调负电容C_comp ≈ -C_gate，有效抵消栅极介电电容，使C_total/C_S趋近于1。使用量子反常霍尔器件验证该方法，该器件与轴子绝缘体具有相同的表面态物理但允许通过单栅极直接电荷测量。
AI.result: 在量子反常霍尔器件中，该方法从初始衰减一半的状态恢复了超过95%的量子化电荷信号，验证了补偿方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该补偿方法为解析微弱的拓扑磁电效应信号提供了稳健手段，为实现四维量子霍尔效应的直接测量提供了有前景的途径。

title: Ab initio quasi-harmonic thermoelasticity, piezoelectricity, and thermoelectricity of polar solids at finite temperature and pressure: Application to wurtzite ZnO
summary: We generalize a previously established ab initio approach-originally developed for hexagonal close-packed (hcp) metals-to accommodate solids with both internal and external degrees of freedom.
