This extension enables the thermodynamic and thermoelastic characterization of insulators, including those with non-vanishing piezoelectric and pyroelectric tensors. Utilizing Density Functional Theory (DFT) and Density Functional Perturbation Theory (DFPT) within the quasi-harmonic approximation, we derive the pressure and temperature dependence of these properties. Specifically, we investigate internal degrees of freedom using two distinct frameworks: the Zero Static Internal Stress Approximation (ZSISA) and Full Free Energy Minimization (FFEM). We then compare these approximations by computing internal and external thermal expansions, as well as temperature-dependent piezoelectric and pyroelectric tensors. Finally, we demonstrate the generalized formalism by calculating the thermodynamic properties of wurtzite ZnO across a broad range of pressures and temperatures.

AI.tldr: 将原本用于hcp金属的ab initio方法扩展到具有内外自由度的固体，用于绝缘体的热力学和热弹性表征，特别处理压电和热电效应
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要针对hcp金属，需要扩展到能处理具有内部自由度（如原子位置）和外部自由度（如晶格参数）的绝缘体材料，特别是那些具有压电和热电效应的材料
AI.method: 基于DFT和DFPT在准谐近似下，采用两种框架处理内部自由度：零静态内应力近似（ZSISA）和完全自由能最小化（FFEM），计算压力温度依赖的热力学性质
AI.result: 建立了广义形式化方法，能够计算绝缘体的内外热膨胀以及温度依赖的压电和热电张量，并以纤锌矿ZnO为例展示了该方法在宽压温范围内的应用
AI.conclusion: 成功扩展了ab initio方法到具有内外自由度的固体，为绝缘体材料的热力学和热弹性性质计算提供了通用框架，特别适用于压电和热电材料的研究

title: Impact of scissors-correction schemes on second-harmonic generation in ultraviolet nonlinear-optical crystals
summary: We assess two widely used scissors-correction implementations for first-principles calculations of second-harmonic generation in ultraviolet nonlinear-optical (UV-NLO) crystals, namely scheme-L [Phys.\ Rev.\ Lett.\ \textbf{63}, 1719 (1989)] and scheme-N [Phys.\ Rev.\ B \textbf{72}, 045223 (2005)]. To enable controlled and numerically robust comparisons, we derive a unified static-limit formulation that avoids spurious divergences and is applicable to both schemes, extending earlier static-limit treatments that were effectively restricted to scheme-L. Benchmark calculations for representative borate and phosphate UV-NLO crystals show that both schemes largely preserve the spectral line shape while mainly rescaling the overall response. Scheme-N yields systematically 15\%--25\% larger magnitudes than scheme-L, although for several tensor components scheme-L agrees better with available experimental benchmarks. We further show that Kleinman symmetry is satisfied in the static limit at the level of the formal theory, whereas apparent violations in practical calculations arise mainly from the sum-rule-based approximation used to evaluate generalized derivatives.

AI.tldr: 评估两种剪刀修正方案（scheme-L和scheme-N）在紫外非线性光学晶体二次谐波生成计算中的表现，发现两者保持光谱形状但幅度不同，scheme-N比scheme-L大15%-25%。
AI.motivation: 评估两种广泛使用的剪刀修正方案（scheme-L和scheme-N）在紫外非线性光学晶体二次谐波生成第一性原理计算中的表现，因为现有静态极限处理主要限于scheme-L，需要统一框架进行可控比较。
AI.method: 推导统一的静态极限公式，避免虚假发散并适用于两种方案；对代表性硼酸盐和磷酸盐紫外非线性光学晶体进行基准计算；比较两种方案的光谱线形和幅度差异。
AI.result: 两种方案基本保持光谱线形，主要影响整体响应幅度；scheme-N比scheme-L大15%-25%；对于多个张量分量，scheme-L与现有实验基准更吻合；静态极限下形式理论满足Kleinman对称性。
AI.conclusion: 两种剪刀修正方案在紫外非线性光学晶体二次谐波生成计算中表现相似但幅度不同，scheme-L与实验更一致；Kleinman对称性违反主要源于广义导数评估中使用的求和规则近似。

title: Fokker-Planck description of an active Brownian particle with rotational inertia
summary: We develop a perturbative framework to calculate the mean-squared displacement (MSD) of active Brownian particles (ABPs) with a finite moment of inertia. Starting from the corresponding Fokker-Planck equation, we employ a Fourier transform for the spatial coordinates and Hermite polynomials as eigenfunctions for the angular velocity, which enables a systematic perturbative expansion of the MSD order by order. By resumming the resulting series in Laplace space and performing the inverse transform, we obtain an explicit expression for the MSD as a function of the moment of inertia. The analytical results are further validated by comparison with numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种微扰框架来计算具有有限转动惯量的活性布朗粒子的均方位移，通过傅里叶变换和厄米多项式展开，在拉普拉斯空间进行级数重求和，得到MSD的解析表达式。
AI.motivation: 研究具有有限转动惯量的活性布朗粒子的动力学行为，特别是其均方位移特性，这对于理解活性物质的非平衡统计物理具有重要意义。
AI.method: 从Fokker-Planck方程出发，对空间坐标进行傅里叶变换，对角速度使用厄米多项式作为本征函数，建立系统的微扰展开框架，在拉普拉斯空间对级数进行重求和。
AI.result: 获得了均方位移作为转动惯量函数的显式解析表达式，并通过数值模拟验证了理论结果的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了计算具有有限转动惯量活性布朗粒子均方位移的微扰理论框架，为研究此类系统的动力学行为提供了有效的解析工具。

title: Fabry-Pérot interferometry with stochastic anyonic sources
summary: We investigate the interference of Laughlin quasiparticles (QPs) in the fractional quantum Hall regime that are stochastically injected into a Fabry-Pérot interferometer. We find that the effective Aharonov-Bohm (AB) phase accumulated along the interferometer loop acquires an additional contribution of $\sin(2πλ)/2$ per QP present on it, where $πλ$ is the QP exchange phase. This contribution originates from time-domain braiding processes associated with injected QPs passing the interferometer quantum point contacts. In the limit of symmetric QP injection, the tunneling current noise exhibits AB oscillations as a function of the total injected current, providing access to the exchange phase $πλ$. In the regime of large total injection, we identify a universal Fano factor that displays power-law scaling and a characteristic phase shift reflecting real-space QP braiding along the interferometer edges. These results are relevant for accessing anyonic exchange statistics in mesoscopic interferometers.

AI.tldr: 研究分数量子霍尔体系中随机注入Fabry-Pérot干涉仪的Laughlin准粒子干涉，发现有效Aharonov-Bohm相位获得与准粒子交换相位相关的额外贡献，可通过隧穿电流噪声测量交换相位。
AI.motivation: 研究分数量子霍尔体系中准粒子的任意子交换统计特性，通过干涉仪实验探索准粒子的时间域编织过程，为测量任意子交换相位提供新方法。
AI.method: 使用Fabry-Pérot干涉仪，随机注入Laughlin准粒子，分析准粒子通过量子点接触时的时间域编织过程对Aharonov-Bohm相位的影响，研究隧穿电流噪声的振荡特性。
AI.result: 发现有效AB相位获得额外贡献sin(2πλ)/2（每个准粒子），对称注入时隧穿电流噪声随总注入电流呈现AB振荡，可提取交换相位πλ；大注入极限下发现普适Fano因子具有幂律标度和特征相移。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为在介观干涉仪中探测任意子交换统计提供了新途径，通过时间域编织过程和电流噪声测量可获取准粒子的交换相位信息。

title: Non-equilibrium bosonization of fractional quantum Hall edges
comment: Main text 36 pages, 8 Figures, Supplemental Material 17 pages
summary: Edge transport serves as a powerful probe of remarkable low-energy properties of fractional quantum Hall states, including the anyonic character of their excitations. Here, we develop a theory of fractional quantum Hall edges driven out of equilibrium, which is based on the Keldysh action for the bosonized chiral Luttinger liquid. With this non-equilibrium FQH bosonization framework, we first consider a single-mode Laughlin edge and analyze the full counting statistics of charge, the quasiparticle Green's functions, and tunneling transport properties through a quantum point contact, allowing for generic edge excitations. We then extend the formalism to multi-mode edges with inter-mode interactions, and explore, with focus on the $ν=4/3$ and $ν=2/3$ edges as paradigmatic examples, how interaction-induced fractionalization of anyons modifies the edge dynamics and the associated transport observables. While the full counting statistics probes the fractionalized charge of the excitations, the Green's functions and tunneling transport are governed by mutual braiding phases of fractionalized excitations and tunneling quasiparticles. We emphasize in particular the effect of interaction-induced fractionalization on the Fano factor $F$ and the differential Fano factor $F_d$, observables that can be measured experimentally. Our formalism, which provides a unified framework for non-equilibrium transport in FQH edges and Luttinger liquids, permits extracting anyonic braiding information from non-equilibrium edge-transport experiments, and paves the way to various extensions, including more involved experimental geometries and edge structures.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了分数量子霍尔边缘的非平衡理论，基于手性Luttinger液体的Keldysh作用量，研究了单模和多模边缘的电荷统计、格林函数和隧穿输运，特别关注相互作用诱导的任意子分数量子化对输运观测量的影响。
AI.motivation: 边缘输运是探测分数量子霍尔态低能性质（包括其激发的任意子特性）的有力工具。然而，需要发展一个非平衡理论框架来研究分数量子霍尔边缘在非平衡条件下的输运特性，特别是相互作用诱导的任意子分数量子化如何影响边缘动力学和输运观测。
AI.method: 基于手性Luttinger液体的Keldysh作用量，建立了非平衡分数量子霍尔玻色化框架。首先分析单模Laughlin边缘的电荷全计数统计、准粒子格林函数和量子点接触隧穿输运；然后扩展到具有模间相互作用的多模边缘，以ν=4/3和ν=2/3边缘为范例，研究相互作用诱导的任意子分数量子化如何修改边缘动力学。
AI.result: 全计数统计探测激发的分数量子化电荷，而格林函数和隧穿输运由分数量子化激发与隧穿准粒子之间的相互编织相位决定。特别强调了相互作用诱导的分数量子化对Fano因子F和微分Fano因子F_d的影响，这些观测量可通过实验测量。该理论为从非平衡边缘输运实验中提取任意子编织信息提供了统一框架。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为非平衡分数量子霍尔边缘和Luttinger液体输运提供了统一理论框架，允许从非平衡边缘输运实验中提取任意子编织信息，并为扩展到更复杂的实验几何结构和边缘结构铺平了道路。

title: Large-scale Integration of Experimental and Computational Data for 2D Materials
summary: The past decade has seen rapid growth in the number of experimentally realized two-dimensional (2D) materials with diverse chemical and physical properties. However, information on their crystal structure, synthesis routes, and measured or predicted properties, remains scattered across thousands of publications. Here we consolidate this fragmented knowledge by establishing X2DB - an open infrastructure that integrates experimental and computational data on 2D materials. Using extensive literature mining and direct community uploads, we identify 370 unique 2D materials that have been realized in monolayer or few-layer form, and link them to their digital counterparts in computational databases, enabling consistent ab initio characterization of their properties across monolayer, bilayer and bulk forms. We describe the structure and content of the database highlighting its support for community uploads, illustrate how it can be used to generate new scientific insight and introduce a hierarchical classification of the known set of 2D materials. Our work provides a foundation for the integration and cross-fertilization of experimental and theoretical knowledge, opening new avenues for data-driven, predictive synthesis of novel 2D materials.

AI.tldr: X2DB是一个整合实验和计算数据的二维材料开放数据库，包含370种已实现的单层或少层二维材料，支持社区上传和跨平台数据关联。
AI.motivation: 二维材料研究快速发展，但晶体结构、合成路线和性质数据分散在数千篇文献中，缺乏系统整合，阻碍了数据驱动的材料发现。
AI.method: 通过广泛的文献挖掘和社区直接上传，识别已实现的二维材料，并将其与计算数据库中的数字对应物链接，实现从单层、双层到块体形式的一致性质表征。
AI.result: 建立了包含370种独特二维材料的X2DB数据库，支持社区上传，提供了已知二维材料的分层分类，展示了如何利用数据库生成新的科学见解。
AI.conclusion: X2DB为实验和理论知识的整合提供了基础，为数据驱动的二维材料预测合成开辟了新途径。

title: Benchmarking mixed quantum-classical dynamics for collective electronic strong coupling
summary: Experiments indicate that collective coupling of molecular ensembles to confined optical modes can modify excited-state dynamics and photochemical reactivity. To describe such cavity-induced effects at atomic resolution, semi-classical molecular dynamics approaches have been developed that treat nuclear motion classically while describing the collective light-matter interaction within the Tavis-Cummings framework of quantum electrodynamics. Here, we benchmark mixed quantum-classical approaches, Ehrenfest dynamics and Fewest-Switches Surface Hopping (FSSH), for simulating nonadiabatic dynamics of electronically strongly coupled carbon monoxide molecules. Their predictions are compared against numerically exact quantum dynamics simulations performed with the multi-configuration time-dependent Hartree (MCTDH) method, which treats both electronic and nuclear degrees of freedom quantum mechanically. We find that the semi-classical approaches reproduce the qualitative features of the full quantum dynamics. Quantitative agreement is best achieved with FSSH when a decoherence correction is included. These results demonstrate that mixed quantum-classical methods provide a computationally efficient and quantitatively reliable alternative to fully quantum simulations for investigating nonadiabatic photochemistry under collective electronic strong coupling in systems beyond the reach of exact quantum treatments.

AI.tldr: 论文比较了混合量子-经典方法（Ehrenfest动力学和FSSH）与精确量子动力学（MCTDH）在模拟强耦合CO分子非绝热动力学中的表现，发现FSSH在包含退相干修正时能获得最佳定量一致性。
AI.motivation: 研究集体光-物质耦合对分子激发态动力学和光化学反应性的影响，需要开发能够描述原子分辨率下腔诱导效应的计算方法。混合量子-经典方法作为计算高效的替代方案，需要验证其在强耦合系统中的可靠性。
AI.method: 使用两种混合量子-经典方法：Ehrenfest动力学和最少切换面跳跃（FSSH），并与精确量子动力学方法多组态含时Hartree（MCTDH）进行对比。研究对象是强耦合的二氧化碳分子非绝热动力学。
AI.result: 半经典方法能够复现全量子动力学的主要定性特征。当包含退相干修正时，FSSH方法能够获得最佳的定量一致性。混合量子-经典方法在计算效率上显著优于完全量子模拟。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子-经典方法为研究集体电子强耦合下的非绝热光化学过程提供了计算高效且定量可靠的替代方案，特别适用于超出精确量子处理能力范围的系统。

title: Sampling the Liquid-Gas Critical Point with Boltzmann Generators
summary: Generative models based on invertible transformations provide a physics-aware route to sample equilibrium configurations directly from the Boltzmann distribution, enabling efficient exploration of complex thermodynamic landscapes. Here, we evaluate their applicability in regions where conventional simulations suffer from severe dynamical bottlenecks, focusing on the liquid-gas critical point of a Lennard-Jones fluid. We show that Boltzmann Generators capture essential signatures of critical behavior, retain reliable performance when trained at or near criticality, and extrapolate across neighboring states of the phase diagram. An intriguing observation is that the model's efficiency metric closely traces the underlying phase boundaries, hinting at a connection between generative performance and thermodynamics. However, the approach remains limited by the small system sizes currently accessible, which suppress the large fluctuations that characterize critical phenomena. Our results delineate the current capabilities and boundaries of Boltzmann Generators in challenging regions of phase space, while pointing toward future applications in problems dominated by slow dynamics, such as glass formation and nucleation.

AI.tldr: 玻尔兹曼生成器在临界点附近能捕捉关键物理特征，但受限于小系统尺寸无法完全表征临界涨落
AI.motivation: 评估基于可逆变换的生成模型在传统模拟存在严重动力学瓶颈区域（如液-气临界点）的适用性，探索其在慢动力学问题中的应用潜力
AI.method: 使用玻尔兹曼生成器（基于可逆变换的生成模型）直接采样玻尔兹曼分布，在Lennard-Jones流体的液-气临界点区域进行训练和测试
AI.result: 玻尔兹曼生成器能捕捉临界行为的关键特征，在临界点附近训练时保持可靠性能，并能外推到相图相邻状态；模型效率指标与相边界密切相关
AI.conclusion: 该方法在挑战性相空间区域展现了潜力，但受限于当前可访问的小系统尺寸；未来可应用于玻璃形成、成核等慢动力学主导的问题

title: Dynamical quantum phase transitions through the lens of mode dynamics
summary: We study the mode dynamics of a generic quadratic fermionic Hamiltonian under a sudden quench protocol in momentum space. Modes with zero energy at any given time, $t$, are referred to as dynamical critical modes. Among all zero-energy modes, spin-flip symmetry is restored in the eigenvector corresponding to selected zero-energy modes. This symmetry restoration is used to define the dynamical quantum phase transition (DQPT). This shows that the occurrence of these dynamical critical modes is necessary but not sufficient for a DQPT. We show that the conditions on the quench protocol and time for such dynamical symmetry restoration are the same as the divergence of the rate function and integer jump in the dynamical topological order parameter, which have been the traditional identifiers of a DQPT. This perspective also naturally explains when one or both of DQPT and ground-state quantum phase transitions will occur.

AI.tldr: 研究动量空间中突然淬灭协议下一般二次费米子哈密顿量的模式动力学，定义了动力学临界模式，发现自旋翻转对称性恢复与DQPT的关系
AI.motivation: 探索动力学量子相变（DQPT）的本质，理解传统DQPT标识（速率函数发散和动力学拓扑序参数整数跳跃）与动力学临界模式中对称性恢复之间的关系
AI.method: 研究动量空间中一般二次费米子哈密顿量在突然淬灭协议下的模式动力学，分析零能量模式（动力学临界模式）的自旋翻转对称性恢复条件
AI.result: 发现动力学临界模式的出现是DQPT的必要但不充分条件；对称性恢复的条件与传统DQPT标识完全一致；该视角能自然解释DQPT和基态量子相变的发生情况
AI.conclusion: 通过动力学临界模式中的对称性恢复来定义DQPT，为理解动力学量子相变提供了新的统一视角，将传统标识与对称性恢复联系起来

title: Domain-Direct Band Gaps: Classification and Material Realization
summary: The conventional classification of direct band-gap semiconductors relies on point-like extrema in momentum space. Here, we introduce the concept of domain-direct band gaps, where the conduction-band minimum (CBM) and valence-band maximum (VBM) form extended manifolds in the Brillouin zone. We demonstrate this concept through the material realization of an extreme two-dimensional-two-dimensional (2D-2D) domain-direct band gap in twisted diamond. First-principles calculations show that both the CBM and VBM exhibit nearly flat 2D manifolds in the kx-ky plane with minimal energy variation (a few meV), yielding a direct band gap of 3.264 eV. In contrast, strong dispersion along the out-of-plane kz direction induces anisotropic carrier dynamics, with strongly suppressed in-plane Fermi velocities (down to about 10$^1$-10$^3$ m/s in certain directions) and much larger out-of-plane velocities (about 10$^6$ m/s). The nearly flat CBM and VBM manifolds enhance the joint density of states, leading to a pronounced optical absorption peak at the band gap onset. This new type of domain-direct gap, coupled with strong directional anisotropy, opens up opportunities for anisotropic optoelectronic applications. Our results establish domain-direct band gaps as a new class of semiconductors, demonstrating their feasibility in real materials.

AI.tldr: 提出"域直接带隙"新概念，其中导带底和价带顶在布里渊区形成扩展的二维流形，在扭曲金刚石材料中实现，具有强各向异性载流子动力学和增强的光学吸收。
AI.motivation: 传统直接带隙半导体依赖于动量空间中的点状极值，限制了载流子动力学和光学性质的调控。需要探索新的带隙类型以实现更丰富的电子和光学特性。
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算研究扭曲金刚石材料，分析其能带结构、载流子有效质量、费米速度等性质，验证域直接带隙概念。
AI.result: 在扭曲金刚石中实现了极端的2D-2D域直接带隙：导带底和价带顶在kx-ky平面形成几乎平坦的二维流形（能量变化仅几meV），带隙为3.264 eV。载流子动力学表现出强各向异性：面内费米速度极低（10^1-10^3 m/s），面外速度很高（约10^6 m/s）。平坦的能带流形增强了联合态密度，导致带隙起始处出现显著的光学吸收峰。
AI.conclusion: 域直接带隙代表了一类新的半导体类型，结合强方向各向异性，为各向异性光电器件应用开辟了新机会。研究证明了这种新型带隙在实际材料中的可行性。

title: MQED-QD: An Open-Source Package for Quantum Dynamics Simulation in Complex Dielectric Environments
summary: Simulating the dynamics of molecular excitons in complex nanophotonic environments requires integrating rigorous electromagnetic simulations with accurate treatments of open quantum system dynamics. In this work, we develop MQED-QD (Macroscopic Quantum Electrodynamics for Quantum Dynamics), a robust computational package for simulating exciton dynamics in arbitrary dielectric and plasmonic environments. Based on the MQED framework, the package offers a unified workflow for constructing the dyadic Green's functions from classical electromagnetic solvers, parametrizing quantum master equations, and propagating the time evolution to determine the molecular subsystem's dynamical properties. To demonstrate the package's capabilities, we simulate exciton transport within a one-dimensional molecular chain near a silver nanostructure, including benchmarking against planar surfaces and exploring the influence of silver nanorods. Our results reveal that surface plasmon polaritons on nanorods dramatically enhance long-range dipole-dipole interactions, accelerating exciton delocalization and yielding higher participation ratios compared to planar geometries. By elucidating accurate molecular exciton dynamics in conjunction with nanophotonics and plasmonics, MQED-QD provides a powerful, open-source package that facilitates the rational design of nanoscale architectures.

AI.tldr: 开发了MQED-QD计算包，用于模拟任意介电和等离子体环境中的激子动力学，基于宏观量子电动力学框架，通过表面等离子体极化激元增强长程偶极-偶极相互作用，加速激子离域化。
AI.motivation: 在复杂纳米光子环境中模拟分子激子动力学需要将严格的电磁模拟与开放量子系统动力学准确处理相结合，目前缺乏统一的计算工具。
AI.method: 基于宏观量子电动力学框架开发MQED-QD计算包，提供从经典电磁求解器构建并矢格林函数、参数化量子主方程、传播时间演化以确定分子子系统动力学特性的统一工作流程。
AI.result: 模拟显示纳米棒上的表面等离子体极化激元显著增强长程偶极-偶极相互作用，加速激子离域化，相比平面几何结构产生更高的参与比。
AI.conclusion: MQED-QD是一个强大的开源计算包，通过阐明纳米光子学和等离子体学中的准确分子激子动力学，促进纳米尺度架构的合理设计。

title: Waiting-time based entropy estimators in continuous space without Markovian events
summary: Estimating entropy production in continuous systems that can only be observed with a limited resolution remains an open problem in stochastic thermodynamics. Extant estimators based on the measurement of waiting-time distributions require either the detection of Markovian events, which uniquely determine the state of the system, or assume a discrete underlying dynamics. We present a novel estimator that relies solely on the detection of a single particle leaving or entering regions, or crossing manifolds, in continuous space. This estimator is based on the frequency and the duration of transitions between such events. We derive this bound by introducing two kinds of discretization of space. Finally, we compare our novel bound to the TUR using simulations of a Brownian vortex and discuss its relation to other lower bounds to entropy production.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的熵产生估计器，仅需检测连续空间中粒子离开/进入区域或穿越流形的事件，基于事件间的频率和持续时间来估计熵产生。
AI.motivation: 在连续系统中，当只能以有限分辨率观测时，估计熵产生仍然是一个开放问题。现有基于等待时间分布的估计器要么需要检测马尔可夫事件（唯一确定系统状态），要么假设离散的底层动力学。
AI.method: 提出一种新估计器，仅依赖于检测连续空间中单个粒子离开/进入区域或穿越流形的事件。该估计器基于此类事件之间转换的频率和持续时间，通过引入两种空间离散化来推导这个下界。
AI.result: 推导出新的熵产生下界，并通过布朗涡旋的模拟将其与TUR（热力学不确定性关系）进行比较，讨论了该下界与其他熵产生下界的关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为连续系统中有限分辨率观测下的熵产生估计提供了新方法，仅需检测基本事件（粒子穿越边界）即可获得有效的下界估计。

title: Observation of Superfluidity and Meissner Effect of Composite Bosons in GaAs Quantum Hall System
comment: The first three listed authors contributed equally to this work
summary:
The quantum Hall effect (QHE) is theoretically understood as a superfluid condensate of composite bosons (CBs) -- bound states of electrons and magnetic flux quanta. While dissipationless transport is consistent with this picture, other signatures of superfluidity, such as the Meissner effect, remain elusive. Here, we present direct experimental evidence for CB superfluidity by probing the system's response to a controlled, time-varying magnetic field in Corbino disk geometries. We simultaneously observe the quantized Laughlin charge pumping and a new, quantized charge accumulation phenomenon, governed by the relation $ΔQ_{\rm a}/e = ν\,(ΔΦ/Φ_0)$. This relation signifies that the system actively maintains the fixed electron-to-flux ratio that defines the CBs, neutralizing excess flux by drawing in a precise number of electrons.
  Crucially, devices with multiple concentric top gates reveal that this charge accumulation is uniformly distributed across the bulk of the QHE fluid, demonstrating that it is a collective, bulk property rather than an edge effect -- a key signature of a superfluid condensate. Furthermore, the presence of a top gate determines the screening mechanism: in a "grand canonical" setting with a gate, low Coulomb energy favors a charge-mediated screening (generalized Meissner effect); without a gate, the system enters a "canonical" regime, exhibiting fixed electron density like type-II superconductors. These observations confirm the CB superfluid nature of the QHE ground state and establish a versatile platform for studying macroscopic quantum coherence and its screening transitions in two dimensions.

AI.tldr: 实验首次直接观测到复合玻色子超流性，通过测量量子霍尔系统对时变磁场的响应，发现电荷累积现象均匀分布于体区，证实了超流体凝聚态特性。
AI.motivation: 量子霍尔效应理论上被理解为复合玻色子（电子与磁通量子的束缚态）的超流体凝聚态，但除了无耗散输运外，其他超流体特征（如迈斯纳效应）一直难以观测。本研究旨在寻找复合玻色子超流性的直接实验证据。
AI.method: 使用Corbino圆盘几何结构，通过施加可控的时变磁场来探测系统响应。采用具有多个同心顶栅的器件，同时观测量子化的Laughlin电荷泵浦和新的量子化电荷累积现象。
AI.result: 实验观测到电荷累积遵循关系ΔQ_a/e = ν(ΔΦ/Φ_0)，表明系统主动维持固定的电子-磁通比。多栅器件显示电荷累积均匀分布于量子霍尔流体的体区，而非边缘效应。顶栅的存在决定了屏蔽机制：有栅时为"巨正则"体系，电荷介导屏蔽；无栅时为"正则"体系，固定电子密度。
AI.conclusion: 这些观测结果证实了量子霍尔基态的复合玻色子超流性，并建立了一个研究二维宏观量子相干性及其屏蔽转变的多功能平台。

title: Altermagnetic Metal-Organic Frameworks
summary: Altermagnetism has recently emerged as a new class of spin compensated magnetic materials that exhibit momentum dependent spin splitting despite having zero net magnetization. The origin of these electronic signatures lies in symmetry operations that connect opposite spin sublattices while allowing spin splitting in momentum space. While most candidate materials identified so far belong to inorganic crystals with fixed lattice symmetries, the realization of altermagnetism ultimately requires platforms in which magnetic symmetry can be deliberately engineered. In this Perspective, we discuss how metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) provide a unique chemical platform to address this challenge. We first place altermagnetism in the broader context of magnetic and electronically active metal-organic networks, highlighting how reticular chemistry enables precise control over lattice geometry, dimensionality and electronic structure. We then discuss how these features position framework materials as promising candidates for realizing altermagnetism and highlight the key challenges that must be addressed to translate theoretical proposals into experimentally accessible systems. Finally, we critically assess current experimental challenges and outline emerging directions for realizing and controlling altermagnetism in coordination framework materials, which emerge as a versatile and powerful platform for exploring new paradigms in spintronics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出金属有机框架（MOFs）作为实现交变磁性的新平台，通过可设计的晶格对称性来工程化这种新型磁性材料。
AI.motivation: 交变磁性是一种新型自旋补偿磁性材料，具有零净磁化但动量依赖的自旋分裂特性。目前大多数候选材料是无机晶体，其晶格对称性固定，需要能够工程化磁性对称性的平台。金属有机框架因其可设计的晶格结构和电子特性成为理想平台。
AI.method: 论文采用视角性分析，首先将交变磁性置于金属有机网络的更广泛背景中，强调网状化学如何实现对晶格几何、维度和电子结构的精确控制。然后讨论这些特性如何使框架材料成为实现交变磁性的有希望候选者。
AI.result: 金属有机框架被定位为实现交变磁性的有前景平台，其可设计的晶格对称性和电子结构特性为解决工程化磁性对称性的挑战提供了独特化学平台。
AI.conclusion: 金属有机框架作为实现交变磁性的多功能平台，为探索自旋电子学新范式提供了强大基础，但需要解决将理论提案转化为实验可及系统的关键挑战。

title: Quantum Dynamical and isotopic effects for Hydrogen isotopes scattering at W(110) surface
summary: We investigate the scattering of hydrogen isotopes at the W(110) surface using both classical and quantum dynamics approaches to elucidate the role of quantum effects in this system. To characterize the scattering process we focus on key observables, including the absorption probability and diffraction channels that we evaluate at the quasi-classical and quantum levels. The quantum dynamics reveal pronounced resonance structures in the absorption curve that we rationalize in terms of diffraction-mediated selective adsorption and focused sticking mechanisms. Diffraction probabilities for reflected trajectories exhibit strong quantum effects at low incident energies, where classical dynamics underestimate the back scattering probability. These effects become less pronounced with increasing isotope mass, from hydrogen to tritium, however discrepancies between the classical and quantum description persist at low incident energies.

AI.tldr: 研究氢同位素在W(110)表面的散射，比较经典与量子动力学方法，揭示量子效应在低能散射中的重要性
AI.motivation: 阐明量子效应对氢同位素在W(110)表面散射过程的影响，特别是低入射能量下的量子现象
AI.method: 采用经典动力学和量子动力学两种方法，分析吸收概率和衍射通道等关键观测参数
AI.result: 量子动力学揭示吸收曲线中的显著共振结构，源于衍射介导的选择性吸附和聚焦粘附机制；低入射能量下衍射概率显示强烈量子效应，经典动力学低估背散射概率；量子效应随同位素质量增加（从氢到氚）而减弱，但低能下经典与量子描述差异仍然存在
AI.conclusion: 量子效应对氢同位素在W(110)表面散射过程至关重要，特别是在低入射能量下，经典动力学方法无法准确描述这些量子现象

title: The bliss of dimensionality: how an unsupervised criterion identifies optimal low-resolution representations of high-dimensional datasets
summary: Selecting the optimal resolution for discretizing high-dimensional data is a central problem in physics and data analysis, particularly in unsupervised settings where the underlying distribution is unknown. The Relevance-Resolution (Res-Rel) framework addresses this issue through an information-theoretic trade-off between descriptive detail and statistical reliability. Here we provide a systematic validation of this approach by comparing its characteristic optima--maximum relevance and the -1 slope (information-theoretic) point--with the discretization that minimizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence from a known or physically motivated ground truth distribution. Across unstructured and structured synthetic datasets, Gaussian clones of MNIST, and molecular dynamics simulations of the alanine dipeptide, we find that as the dimensionality or informative content increases the KL-optimal discretization consistently lies within the Res-Rel optimality region. Furthermore, in high-dimensional regimes the -1 slope criterion closely matches the KL divergence minimum. These results establish the quantitative consistency of unsupervised information-theoretic selection with distribution-based optimality.

AI.tldr: 验证Res-Rel框架在无监督高维数据离散化中的有效性：通过比较其最优解（最大相关性和-1斜率点）与基于真实分布的KL散度最小化，发现KL最优离散化位于Res-Rel最优区域内，且在高维情况下-1斜率准则与KL最小值高度一致。
AI.motivation: 高维数据离散化中分辨率选择是一个核心问题，特别是在无监督设置下，真实分布未知。需要验证信息论框架（Res-Rel）的最优解是否与基于真实分布的最优离散化一致。
AI.method: 系统比较Res-Rel框架的两个特征最优解（最大相关性和-1斜率点）与基于已知或物理动机真实分布的KL散度最小化离散化。在多种数据集上测试：非结构化和结构化合成数据、MNIST的高斯克隆、丙氨酸二肽的分子动力学模拟。
AI.result: 随着维度或信息内容增加，KL最优离散化始终位于Res-Rel最优区域内。在高维情况下，-1斜率准则与KL散度最小值高度匹配。
AI.conclusion: 研究确立了无监督信息论选择与基于分布最优性之间的定量一致性，验证了Res-Rel框架在高维数据离散化中的有效性。

title: Antialtermagnetic Magnons and Nonrelativistic Thermal Edelstein Effect
summary: Odd-parity magnets are noncollinear compensated magnets with spin-split band structure in the absence of spin-orbit coupling and dipolar interactions. In contrast to altermagnets, their spin-polarized band structure breaks inversion symmetry, but preserves time-reversal symmetry rendering their spin texture odd in momentum space. Here, we study the spin dynamics of the magnetic texture and compute the band structure and spin polarization of magnons. We present minimal spin models of noncoplanar odd-parity magnets free of relativistic interactions that host p- and f-wave spin textures for the magnetic excitations. We demonstrate that two of these models exhibit collinear spin textures, i.e., the magnon spin polarization is restricted to a global (quantization) axis independent of the momentum giving rise to antialtermagnetism, previously associated primarily with coplanar ground states. Finally, the nonrelativistic magnonic thermal Edelstein effect -- a nonequilibrium magnetization induced by a temperature gradient -- is shown to exist for p-wave magnets in linear response and inherits its anisotropic angular dependence from the partial-wave character of the spin-polarized band structure. Our findings suggest that insulating antialtermagnets are promising candidates for magnon spintronics applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了奇宇称磁体的自旋动力学和磁振子性质，提出了无相对论相互作用的非共面奇宇称磁体模型，发现了具有p波和f波自旋纹理的磁激发，并展示了非相对论性磁振子热Edelstein效应。
AI.motivation: 研究奇宇称磁体的自旋动力学和磁振子性质，探索非相对论相互作用下新型磁体模型的特性，为磁振子自旋电子学应用寻找有前景的候选材料。
AI.method: 提出了非共面奇宇称磁体的最小自旋模型，计算了磁振子的能带结构和自旋极化，分析了磁激发的自旋纹理特性，并研究了温度梯度诱导的非平衡磁化效应。
AI.result: 发现了具有p波和f波自旋纹理的磁激发模型，其中两个模型表现出共线自旋纹理（反交变磁性），证明了p波磁体中存在非相对论性磁振子热Edelstein效应，该效应继承了自旋极化能带结构的角依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 绝缘反交变磁体是磁振子自旋电子学应用的有前景候选材料，其非相对论性磁振子热Edelstein效应为热控磁器件提供了新可能性。

title: Manipulation of ferromagnetism with a light-driven nonlinear Edelstein-Zeeman field
summary: Optical control of magnetization is often symmetry-forbidden because electric fields and magnetization transform differently under inversion and time-reversal. However, through even-order nonlinear response, optical excitation can generate a nonequilibrium magnetic density (the nonlinear Edelstein effect) that acts as an internal Edelstein-Zeeman field coupling to slower magnetic degrees of freedom. Here we demonstrate non-thermal, ultrafast optical control of ferromagnetism in the centrosymmetric van der Waals semiconductor Cr$_2$Ge$_2$Te$_6$ via a resonant nonlinear Edelstein effect. Using time-domain THz emission spectroscopy under near-infrared excitation, we directly observe magnetic dipole radiation arising from optically driven magnetization dynamics. The polarization, fluence, and temperature dependences of the THz emission are quantitatively captured by a mean-field description of a weakly anisotropic Heisenberg ferromagnet subject to an Edelstein-Zeeman field. Our results establish a general nonequilibrium route to optical control of magnetism in centrosymmetric materials.

AI.tldr: 通过非线性Edelstein效应实现中心对称材料中磁性的非热超快光学控制
AI.motivation: 在中心对称材料中，由于电场和磁化在反演和时间反演下变换方式不同，磁性的光学控制通常被对称性禁止。需要探索通过非线性响应实现磁性光学控制的新途径。
AI.method: 利用时间域太赫兹发射光谱在近红外激发下，直接观测由光学驱动磁化动力学产生的磁偶极辐射。通过非线性Edelstein效应产生非平衡磁密度，作为内部Edelstein-Zeeman场耦合到较慢的磁自由度。
AI.result: 在中心对称范德华半导体Cr₂Ge₂Te₆中实现了非热、超快的光学铁磁控制。太赫兹发射的偏振、通量和温度依赖性被弱各向异性海森堡铁磁体的平均场描述定量捕捉。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一条在中心对称材料中通过非平衡途径实现磁性光学控制的通用路线，为磁性器件的光学操控提供了新方法。

title: Neural Wavefunction Calculations of μSR Spectra with Quantum Muons and Protons
summary: Accurate prediction of muon hyperfine constants is useful for interpreting muon spin spectroscopy data, yet standard methods such as density functional theory (DFT) compute muon-electron pair density functions, and thus hyperfine constants, by treating the muon as a fixed classical particle. This work uses the variational quantum Monte Carlo method with neural-network trial wavefunctions, a highly accurate and flexible approach recently applied to other quantum chemical problems. The muon can be treated classically or included in the many-particle electron-muon wavefunction, in which case the fully quantum mechanical pair density is obtained directly. We calculate muon hyperfine constants in muoniated methyl and ethyl radicals for both quantum mechanical and fixed classical muons. The hyperfine constants obtained from our fixed-muon calculations in the methyl and ethyl radicals differ from the corresponding DFT results significantly, highlighting the limitations of DFT even when the muon is treated classically. The results with quantum muons are closer to experiment after accounting for environmental effects. These findings suggest that explicitly calculating the quantum mechanical muon-electron pair density improves the accuracy of muon hyperfine constant predictions.

AI.tldr: 使用变分量子蒙特卡洛和神经网络波函数计算μ子超精细常数，比传统DFT方法更准确，量子处理μ子比经典固定处理更接近实验结果。
AI.motivation: 准确预测μ子超精细常数对解释μ子自旋光谱数据很重要，但传统DFT方法将μ子视为固定经典粒子，限制了计算精度。
AI.method: 采用变分量子蒙特卡洛方法结合神经网络试探波函数，将μ子作为量子粒子包含在多粒子电子-μ子波函数中，直接获得完全量子力学的对密度函数。
AI.result: 在甲基和乙基自由基中，固定μ子计算结果与DFT结果显著不同；量子处理μ子的结果在考虑环境效应后更接近实验值。
AI.conclusion: 明确计算量子力学μ子-电子对密度能提高μ子超精细常数预测的准确性，量子处理μ子比经典固定处理更优越。

title: A Geometry-Adaptive Deep Variational Framework for Phase Discovery in the Landau-Brazovskii Model
summary: The discovery of ordered structures in pattern-forming systems, such as the Landau-Brazovskii (LB) model, is often limited by the sensitivity of numerical solvers to the prescribed computational domain size. Incompatible domains induce artificial stress, frequently trapping the system in high-energy metastable configurations. To resolve this issue, we propose a Geometry-Adaptive Deep Variational Framework (GeoDVF) that jointly optimizes the infinite-dimensional order parameter, which is parameterized by a neural network, and the finite-dimensional geometric parameters of the computational domain. By explicitly treating the domain size as trainable variables within the variational formulation, GeoDVF naturally eliminates artificial stress during training. To escape the attraction basin of the disordered phase under small initializations, we introduce a warmup penalty mechanism, which effectively destabilizes the disordered phase, enabling the spontaneous nucleation of complex three-dimensional ordered phases from random initializations. Furthermore, we design a guided initialization protocol to resolve topologically intricate phases associated with narrow basins of attraction. Extensive numerical experiments show that GeoDVF provides a robust and geometry-consistent variational solver capable of identifying both stable and metastable states without prior knowledge.

AI.tldr: GeoDVF：一种几何自适应深度变分框架，通过联合优化神经网络的无限维序参数和计算域的有限维几何参数，消除人工应力，实现复杂三维有序相的自发成核。
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解器对计算域尺寸敏感，不兼容的域会引入人工应力，导致系统陷入高能亚稳态构型，限制了有序结构的发现。
AI.method: 提出几何自适应深度变分框架（GeoDVF），将域尺寸作为可训练变量纳入变分公式；引入预热惩罚机制破坏无序相的吸引盆；设计引导初始化协议处理拓扑复杂相。
AI.result: GeoDVF能够从随机初始化中自发成核复杂三维有序相，识别稳定和亚稳态，无需先验知识，提供鲁棒且几何一致的变分解法。
AI.conclusion: GeoDVF解决了传统方法中人工应力导致的域尺寸敏感性问题，为复杂有序结构的发现提供了有效的变分框架。

title: Finite-size scaling in quasi-3D stick percolation
summary: This work extends the universal finite-size scaling framework for continuum percolation from two-dimensional (2D) to quasi-three-dimensional (Q3D) stick systems, in which sequentially deposited wires of finite diameter stack vertically on a flat substrate. Using Monte Carlo simulation, the percolation threshold is determined for isotropic Q3D stick systems as $N_c l^2 = 6.850923 \pm 0.00014$, approximately $21.5\%$ above the established 2D value of $5.6373$. The threshold is shown to be independent of the wire diameter-to-length ratio $d/l$, reflecting the scale invariance of the contact topology under sequential deposition. Simulation results indicate that, as with 2D networks, by introducing a nonuniversal metric factor, the spanning probability of Q3D stick percolation on square systems with free boundary conditions falls on the same universal scaling function as that for 2D continuum and lattice percolation. This provides substantiating evidence that Q3D stick percolation falls on the same universal scaling function as that for 2D stick percolation and lattice percolation.

AI.tldr: 将二维连续渗流的普适有限尺寸标度框架扩展到准三维棒系统，发现其渗流阈值比二维高约21.5%，且与棒直径长度比无关，证明准三维棒渗流与二维连续渗流和晶格渗流具有相同的普适标度函数。
AI.motivation: 研究准三维棒系统的渗流行为，扩展现有的二维连续渗流理论框架，探究三维堆叠结构对渗流阈值和标度行为的影响。
AI.method: 使用蒙特卡洛模拟研究准三维棒系统，其中有限直径的导线在平坦基底上垂直顺序沉积。通过模拟确定各向同性准三维棒系统的渗流阈值。
AI.result: 准三维棒系统的渗流阈值为 N_c l^2 = 6.850923 ± 0.00014，比二维值5.6373高约21.5%。阈值与导线直径长度比 d/l 无关，表明顺序沉积下接触拓扑具有尺度不变性。引入非普适量度因子后，准三维棒渗流的跨越概率与二维连续渗流和晶格渗流落在相同的普适标度函数上。
AI.conclusion: 准三维棒渗流与二维棒渗流和晶格渗流具有相同的普适标度函数，验证了渗流理论的普适性在从二维扩展到准三维系统时仍然成立。

title: Epitaxial Growth and Electronic Properties of QuasiFreeStanding Rhombohedral WSe2 Bilayers on Cubic W110
summary: Rhombohedral-stacked transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) break inversion symmetry between adjacent layers, giving rise to an intrinsic out-of-plane ferroelectric polarization.Controlling the formation of this stacking polytype is therefore essential for harnessing ferroelectric effects in two-dimensional materials. In this work, we demonstrate the epitaxial growth of rhombohedral bilayer tungsten diselenide (3R-WSe2) on a cubic W(110) single crystal by molecular beam epitaxy. We show that selenium passivation of the substrate is key to enable a quasi van der Waals epitaxy effectively suppressing strong interfacial bonding and promoting the growth of quasi free standing bilayer films. The 3R stacking order is confirmed through a combination of Raman spectroscopy and high-resolution angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), supported by density functional theory (DFT) calculations. ARPES and DFT reveal an indirect-gap electronic structure with the valence-band maximum at the Gamma point, as well as a pronounced spin orbit driven splitting of 520 +- 20 meV at the K point. Analysis of the measured dispersions yields hole effective masses of 0.46 +- 0.04 me and 0.75 +- 0.06 me for the upper and lower valence bands at K point, respectively. These results establish a robust route for synthesizing quasi free standing 3R-WSe2 and provide a platform for exploring the electronic, optical, and ferroelectric functionalities that emerge from inversion symmetry breaking in layered TMDs. Our findings further highlight the potential of cubic substrates for deterministic fabrication of rhombohedral TMD heterostructures and ferroelectric devices at the nanoscale.

AI.tldr: 通过分子束外延在W(110)单晶上生长菱面体堆叠双层WSe2，硒钝化衬底实现准范德华外延，证实3R堆叠结构并揭示其电子特性
AI.motivation: 菱面体堆叠过渡金属二硫化物打破层间反演对称性，产生本征面外铁电极化。控制这种堆叠多型对于利用二维材料中的铁电效应至关重要
AI.method: 采用分子束外延在立方W(110)单晶上生长菱面体双层WSe2，通过硒钝化衬底实现准范德华外延。结合拉曼光谱、高分辨角分辨光电子能谱和密度泛函理论计算确认3R堆叠结构
AI.result: 成功生长准自由站立双层3R-WSe2，确认间接带隙电子结构，价带顶位于Γ点，K点自旋轨道劈裂达520±20 meV，测得空穴有效质量分别为0.46±0.04 me和0.75±0.06 me
AI.conclusion: 建立了合成准自由站立3R-WSe2的可靠途径，为探索层状TMDs中反演对称性破缺产生的电子、光学和铁电功能提供了平台，展示了立方衬底在确定性制造菱面体TMD异质结构和纳米尺度铁电器件方面的潜力

title: Extreme Values of Infinite-Measure Processes
summary: We study the statistics of the maximum and minimum of a set of $N$ random variables whose dynamical and statistical properties fall within the scope of infinite ergodic theory. These non-stationary yet recurrent systems are described, in the long-time limit, by a non-normalizable infinite invariant density. Extreme events in such systems emerge in a joint limit where the observation time $t$ is long and the number of variables $N$ is large. We show that the resulting extreme value statistics are controlled by the return exponent $α$ and the infinite invariant measure, and therefore depart from the classical Fréchet, Gumbel, and Weibull universality classes. We illustrate the theory for weakly chaotic intermittent maps, overdamped diffusion in an asymptotically flat potential, and a stochastic model of sub-recoil laser cooling, and show how measurements of extremes can be used to infer the infinite-density structure.

AI.tldr: 研究无限遍历理论系统中极值统计，发现其偏离经典极值分布类型，由返回指数α和无限不变测度控制
AI.motivation: 研究非平稳但循环的无限遍历系统中的极值统计特性，这些系统由无限不变密度描述，其极值行为与经典系统不同
AI.method: 在观测时间t长且变量数量N大的联合极限下分析极值统计，使用返回指数α和无限不变测度作为控制参数
AI.result: 发现极值统计偏离经典的Fréchet、Gumbel和Weibull普适类，由返回指数α和无限不变测度控制
AI.conclusion: 无限遍历系统中的极值统计具有独特性质，可用于推断无限密度结构，在弱混沌间歇映射、过阻尼扩散和亚反冲激光冷却等系统中得到验证

title: Multi-fidelity Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials for Charged Point Defects
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) can now reproduce the energy, forces and stresses of bulk materials with high accuracy compared to first-principles calculations. The description of imperfections, where coordination environments and electron counts deviate from those found in pristine reference structures, remains a challenge. We find that the current generation of foundation MLIPs do not describe the defect physics of the semiconductor Sb2Se3. We introduce global defect charge embeddings that distinguish the bonding characteristics of different charge states. We further employ a multi-fidelity approach that combines low-cost (semi-local exchange-correlation functional) reference data with high-quality (non-local hybrid functional) energies and forces that describe well the subtleties of the defect energy landscape. The resulting defect-capable force fields can find stable structural configurations and predict charge-transition levels in quantitative agreement with direct quantum mechanical calculations, at a fraction of the computational cost.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种改进机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）描述半导体缺陷物理的方法，通过引入全局缺陷电荷嵌入和多保真度训练策略，显著提升了Sb2Se3等材料中缺陷结构的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 当前基础MLIPs在描述半导体缺陷物理方面存在不足，特别是对于Sb2Se3等材料，无法准确描述缺陷环境中的配位结构和电子计数变化。
AI.method: 1. 引入全局缺陷电荷嵌入，区分不同电荷态的成键特性；2. 采用多保真度方法，结合低成本（半局域交换关联泛函）参考数据与高质量（非局域杂化泛函）能量和力数据；3. 训练能够描述缺陷能量景观细微差异的力场。
AI.result: 开发出的缺陷能力场能够找到稳定的结构构型，预测的电荷转移能级与直接量子力学计算结果定量一致，同时计算成本大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局缺陷电荷嵌入和多保真度训练策略，成功解决了MLIPs在描述半导体缺陷物理方面的局限性，为高效准确预测材料缺陷性质提供了新方法。

title: Equilibrium Thermochemistry and Crystallographic Morphology of Manganese Sulfide Nanocrystals
comment: The abstract was truncated at the end to meet the length requirement for submission; 36 pages with 10 figures in the main text; 38 pages with 12 figures in the supplementary information
summary: Manganese sulfide (MnS) is a p-type magnetic semiconductor whose physicochemical properties are sensitive to nanocrystal (NC) morphology, yet the thermodynamic driving forces governing morphology across MnS polymorphs remain poorly understood. Here, we use density functional theory (DFT) to predict the equilibrium morphologies of rock salt (RS), zinc blende (ZB), and wurtzite (WZ) MnS NCs as a function of the relative chemical potential of sulfur, $Δμ_{S}$. Benchmarking against Heyd$\unicode{x2013}$Scuseria$\unicode{x2013}$Ernzerhof (HSE06) hybrid functional calculations reveals that the r$^2$SCAN meta-generalized gradient approximation reproduces experimental lattice constants and thermochemical reaction energies but underestimates S-terminated polar surface energies by up to a factor of five; applying a Hubbard $U$ correction (r$^2$SCAN+$U$, $U = 2.7$ eV) to the Mn 3d states brings the results into close agreement with HSE06. Using the validated r$^2$SCAN+$U$ framework with the Gibbs$\unicode{x2013}$Wulff theorem, we predict that RS-MnS NCs favor nanocubes across nearly the entire stability window, ZB-MnS NCs transform from rhombic dodecahedra (Mn-rich) to polyhedra with 16 triangular faces (S-rich), and WZ-MnS NCs adopt rod-like morphologies with $Δμ_{S}$-sensitive base truncation. Synthesized RS-MnS NCs confirm the predicted cubic morphology, and high-temperature oxidative solution calorimetry yields an apparent surface energy of 1.15 $\pm$ 0.38 J$\cdot$m$^{-2}$, higher than the theoretical equilibrium value (0.42$\unicode{x2013}$0.43 J$\cdot$m$^{-2}$) due to high-index facet exposure, surface area uncertainty, and non-ideal surface configurations in real samples. This work establishes a framework for predicting the equilibrium morphologies of metal chalcogenide NCs.

AI.tldr: 使用DFT预测MnS纳米晶的平衡形貌，验证r²SCAN+U方法，预测不同硫化学势下三种多晶型的形貌，并通过实验验证立方形态。
AI.motivation: MnS是一种p型磁性半导体，其纳米晶形貌对物理化学性质有重要影响，但不同多晶型的热力学驱动力尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用密度泛函理论（DFT），对比HSE06杂化泛函，验证r²SCAN+U方法，应用Gibbs-Wulff定理预测平衡形貌，并通过实验合成和高温氧化溶液量热法验证。
AI.result: 预测RS-MnS在整个稳定窗口内倾向于纳米立方体，ZB-MnS从菱形十二面体（Mn富集）转变为16个三角形面的多面体（S富集），WZ-MnS呈现棒状形态。实验合成的RS-MnS证实了立方形态，表面能测量值为1.15±0.38 J·m⁻²。
AI.conclusion: 建立了预测金属硫族化合物纳米晶平衡形貌的框架，理论预测与实验结果基本一致，为理解纳米晶形貌控制提供了理论基础。

title: Precise control of crystallography and magnetism in focused-ion-beam transformed iron-nickel thin films
summary: Focused ion beam irradiation of metastable Fe$_{78}$Ni$_{22}$ thin films grown on Cu(100) substrates results in the localized transformation of the originally paramagnetic, face-centered-cubic continuous film into ferromagnetic patterns with body-centered-cubic structure. The direction of the magnetic easy axis can be controlled by the focused ion beam scanning strategy, resulting in eight differently oriented crystallographic domains with different magnetic properties. We study the local crystallographic orientations of the transformed areas by electron backscatter diffraction and correlate these results with local magnetometry measurements. The observed magnetic anisotropy can be explained as a result of residual lattice strain after the fcc$\to$bcc transformation. These results extend the understanding of this material system and its transformation and allow for the patterning of high-quality magnetic nanostructures with precisely controlled magnetization landscapes.

AI.tldr: 利用聚焦离子束辐照Fe78Ni22薄膜，实现从顺磁fcc结构到铁磁bcc结构的局部相变，并通过扫描策略控制磁各向异性方向，制备出具有精确磁化图案的高质量磁性纳米结构。
AI.motivation: 研究聚焦离子束辐照对Fe78Ni22薄膜的相变影响，探索通过控制扫描策略来精确调控磁性纳米结构的磁各向异性方向，为制备高质量磁性纳米结构提供新方法。
AI.method: 在Cu(100)衬底上生长亚稳态Fe78Ni22薄膜，利用聚焦离子束进行局部辐照，通过不同扫描策略控制相变区域的磁各向异性方向，使用电子背散射衍射分析局部晶体学取向，并结合局部磁测量进行关联研究。
AI.result: 聚焦离子束辐照成功将顺磁fcc薄膜局部转变为铁磁bcc结构，产生了8种不同取向的晶体学畴，磁各向异性方向可通过扫描策略精确控制，残余晶格应变是磁各向异性的主要来源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了对Fe78Ni22薄膜相变和磁性的精确控制，为制备具有特定磁化图案的高质量磁性纳米结构提供了有效途径，扩展了该材料体系的应用潜力。

title: Lattice dynamics of the charge density wave compounds TaTe$_4$ and NbTe$_4$ and their evolution across solid solutions
summary: Understanding lattice dynamics is central to elucidating the microscopic origin of charge density waves (CDWs), particularly in materials where electron-phonon coupling can play a dominant role. Raman spectroscopy, combined with first-principles calculations, offers a direct means to identify the vibrational modes involved and to monitor their evolution under controlled perturbations. In this work, we combine density functional theory calculations and Raman spectroscopy measurements to investigate the vibrational properties of the quasi-one-dimensional transition metal tetrachalcogenides TaTe$_4$ and NbTe$_4$, as well as their solid solutions Ta$_{1-x}$Nb$_{x}$Te$_4$ ($x$ = 0.0 - 1.0). For the stoichiometric compounds, first-principles calculations predict a phonon instability consistent with the trimerization associated with the CDW phase, providing theoretical evidence for the lattice distortion driving the transition. The calculated Raman-active modes show good agreement with room-temperature experimental spectra, enabling a systematic assignment of the observed peaks. Across the solid solution, most Raman modes evolve smoothly with composition. In contrast, the highest-frequency E$_{g}$ mode, dominated by transition-metal motion, exhibits a distinct behavior: its frequency remains close to that of the parent compounds while its intensity redistributes with stoichiometry. This evolution highlights the short-range character of this vibrational mode and suggests its relevance to the CDW-related lattice distortion in these materials.

AI.tldr: 通过密度泛函理论计算和拉曼光谱实验研究TaTe₄、NbTe₄及其固溶体的晶格动力学，揭示电荷密度波相变相关的声子不稳定性和振动模式演化。
AI.motivation: 理解晶格动力学对于揭示电荷密度波（CDW）的微观起源至关重要，特别是在电子-声子耦合起主导作用的材料中。拉曼光谱结合第一性原理计算为识别相关振动模式及其在受控扰动下的演化提供了直接手段。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论计算和拉曼光谱测量，研究准一维过渡金属四硫族化物TaTe₄、NbTe₄及其固溶体Ta₁₋ₓNbₓTe₄（x = 0.0-1.0）的振动性质。
AI.result: 对于化学计量化合物，第一性原理计算预测了与CDW相相关的三聚化一致的声子不稳定性，为驱动相变的晶格畸变提供了理论证据。计算得到的拉曼活性模式与室温实验光谱吻合良好。在固溶体中，大多数拉曼模式随成分平滑演化，但最高频率的E_g模式（主要由过渡金属运动主导）表现出独特行为：其频率保持接近母体化合物，而强度随化学计量比重新分布。
AI.conclusion: 最高频率E_g模式的演化突显了该振动模式的短程特性，并表明其与这些材料中CDW相关的晶格畸变有关。这为理解准一维过渡金属四硫族化物中电荷密度波的微观机制提供了重要见解。

title: A Shift-Invariant Deep Learning Framework for Automated Analysis of XPS Spectra
summary: X-ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy (XPS) is a crucial technique for material surface analysis, yet interpreting its spectra is often challenging for both human analysts and automated methods due to the prevalence of variable spectral shifts and overlapping peaks. This project introduces a machine learning solution using a Spatial Transformer Network (STN), a type of neural network that implicitly learns to align spectra. An STN model was designed to classify the chemical environments present in an input spectrum, using functional groups as a proxy. The model was trained and tested on a large synthetic dataset of 100,000 spectra, created by linearly combining real experimental data from a library of 104 polymers. \cite{RN22} To simulate experimental variability, random uniform shifts and broadening were applied to the data. The STN was found to effectively correct for random electrostatic shifts (up to 3.0 eV) and achieved relatively high accuracy ($\sim$ 82\%) in identifying functional groups, despite utilizing a much simpler architecture than previous work. These findings demonstrate that neural networks can effectively learn the underlying relationships between spectral features and chemical composition when they are able to intrinsically account for variable shifts. This work advances the development of more reliable automated XPS analysis, offering potential as an assistive tool for researchers and as a core component in future autonomous systems like self-driving laboratories.

AI.tldr: 使用空间变换网络(STN)自动对齐XPS光谱，通过功能基团分类解决光谱偏移和重叠峰问题，在合成数据集上达到82%准确率
AI.motivation: XPS光谱分析面临光谱偏移和峰重叠的挑战，传统方法和自动化分析都难以准确解释，需要开发能自动对齐光谱的机器学习方法
AI.method: 设计空间变换网络(STN)模型，使用功能基团作为代理分类化学环境；在10万条合成光谱数据集上训练，数据来自104种聚合物的真实实验数据，并添加随机均匀偏移和展宽模拟实验变异性
AI.result: STN能有效校正随机静电偏移(最高3.0 eV)，在功能基团识别上达到约82%的准确率，比先前工作使用更简单的架构
AI.conclusion: 神经网络能够学习光谱特征与化学成分之间的潜在关系，当它们能够内在考虑可变偏移时；这项工作推进了更可靠的自动化XPS分析发展，有望成为研究人员的辅助工具和未来自主系统(如自驱动实验室)的核心组件

title: Automated High-Throughput Screening of Polymers Using a Computational Workflow
summary: High-throughput computational screening of polymers offers a powerful way to address the imbalance between the vast number of polymers synthesised for diverse applications and the relatively small subset that can be studied using atomistic simulations. This work presents an automatic workflow designed to enable the rapid and efficient screening of an extensive polymer library. The workflow integrates an automated annealing protocol with adaptive control, allowing for reproducible simulations with minimal human intervention and minimisation of the computational cost. The availability of a homogenous large set of simulations enables the adoption of machine learning approaches for a variety of tasks. We exemplify this possibility by proposing rapid machine-learning-based method to predict the (computed) polymer density and (experimental) glass transition temperature.

AI.tldr: 开发自动化工作流程，用于高通量计算筛选聚合物，结合自适应退火协议和机器学习预测聚合物密度和玻璃化转变温度
AI.motivation: 解决聚合物合成数量巨大与原子模拟研究能力有限之间的不平衡问题，需要高效筛选聚合物库的方法
AI.method: 开发自动化工作流程，集成自适应控制的自动退火协议，实现可重复模拟并最小化计算成本，然后应用机器学习方法进行预测
AI.result: 建立了能够快速高效筛选大量聚合物库的工作流程，并展示了机器学习方法可以预测计算聚合物密度和实验玻璃化转变温度
AI.conclusion: 自动化工作流程结合机器学习为高通量聚合物筛选提供了有效解决方案，能够加速聚合物材料发现和优化过程

title: Correcting hybrid density functionals to model Y6 and other non-fullerene acceptors
comment: 8 page article, 2 figures; and 10 page supplementary information, 18 figures
summary:
Recently developed fused-ring organic electron-acceptors such as Y6 have strong oscillator strength, good charge-carrier transport and low bandgaps. They therefore have enormous current technical application to optoelectronic devices, such as solar cells. Due to the large number of atoms involved in representative aggregates of these materials, we need an efficient electronic structure method to model them. Standard density functional theory poorly describe charge-transfer states, and were developed for vacuum calculations of individual molecules.
  In this work we tune a range-separated hybrid functional for Y6. We characterise representative dimers of the solid-state and show that Y6 dimers show the extensive solvatochromic effects are due, in part, to oscillator strength borrowing. We provide an explanation for the short optimally-tuned range-separation parameter, based in the Penn model for the frequency dependent dielectric of a semiconductor. We caution that standard range-separated hybrids are less accurate than global hybrids for these, and similar, materials. We show how reducing the range-separation length improves the accuracy of standard functionals, without an involved tuning process.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Y6等稠环有机电子受体材料，通过调节范围分离杂化泛函来改进其电子结构计算，发现标准范围分离杂化泛函不如全局杂化泛函准确，并提出通过减少范围分离长度来提高标准泛函精度的方法。
AI.motivation: Y6等稠环有机电子受体材料具有强振子强度、良好电荷传输特性和低带隙，在光电器件中有重要应用。但由于这些材料代表性聚集体涉及大量原子，需要高效的电子结构方法进行建模。标准密度泛函理论对电荷转移态描述不佳，且主要针对真空中的单个分子计算。
AI.method: 针对Y6材料调节范围分离杂化泛函，表征固态代表性二聚体，分析Y6二聚体表现出的广泛溶剂化显色效应部分源于振子强度借用。基于Penn模型对半导体频率依赖介电常数的解释，提供了最优调节范围分离参数较短的原因。
AI.result: 发现标准范围分离杂化泛函对这些材料（及类似材料）的准确性不如全局杂化泛函。展示了通过减少范围分离长度可以提高标准泛函的准确性，而无需复杂的调节过程。
AI.conclusion: 对于Y6等稠环有机电子受体材料，需要谨慎使用标准范围分离杂化泛函，因为其准确性不如全局杂化泛函。通过减少范围分离长度可以改进标准泛函的性能，这为高效建模这些材料提供了实用方法。

title: High-Pressure Inelastic Neutron Spectroscopy: A true test of Machine-Learned Interatomic Potential energy landscapes
summary:
Machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) promise to provide near density-functional theory accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost, offering a transformative route toward genuinely predictive chemistry. Yet their predictive validity beyond the training regime remains largely untested experimentally.
  Here we use pressure-dependent broadband inelastic neutron spectroscopy (INS) as a direct experimental probe of MLIP transferability. Employing a newly developed high-pressure superalloy clamp cell, we measure INS spectra of crystalline 2,5-diiodothiophene at 10~K under ambient conditions and at 1.5~GPa. A MACE-based MLIP, fine-tuned on targeted DFT data, reproduces the experimental spectra across 0--1200~cm$^{-1}$ at both pressures and remains thermodynamically stable under rigorous molecular dynamics validation at 300~K. The model captures systematic pressure-induced blue shifts arising from steric stiffening and reproduces an anomalous red shift at 453~cm$^{-1}$ driven by pressure-modified intermolecular interactions, providing direct validation of its many-body character.
  This constitutes the first experimental demonstration of MLIP transferability across distinct thermodynamic states using neutron spectroscopy, and establishes high-pressure INS as a stringent benchmark for predictive machine-learned potentials.

AI.tldr: 首次通过高压中子光谱实验验证机器学习原子间势（MLIP）在不同热力学状态间的可迁移性，为预测性机器学习势能提供了严格基准。
AI.motivation: 机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）承诺以较低计算成本提供接近密度泛函理论的精度，但其在训练范围之外的预测有效性尚未得到充分实验验证。
AI.method: 使用压力依赖的宽带非弹性中子光谱（INS）作为MLIP可迁移性的直接实验探针。采用新开发的高压超合金夹紧池，在10K温度下测量2,5-二碘噻吩晶体在常压和1.5GPa下的INS光谱。使用基于MACE的MLIP，在目标DFT数据上进行微调。
AI.result: MLIP在0-1200 cm⁻¹范围内成功复现了两个压力下的实验光谱，并在300K的严格分子动力学验证中保持热力学稳定。模型捕捉到了由空间刚度引起的系统性压力诱导蓝移，并复现了453 cm⁻¹处由压力修饰分子间相互作用驱动的异常红移，验证了其多体特性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次使用中子光谱实验证明MLIP在不同热力学状态间的可迁移性，确立了高压INS作为预测性机器学习势能的严格基准方法。
